title: Tax Support at TaxAce
description:
Why This Role Matters

You are the critical link in our tax pipeline. You ensure that our tax strategists and preparers have exactly what they need to execute flawless returns. By organizing, tracking, and managing critical financial data and client signatures, you ensure our tax operations run with the precision our elite clients expect.



Key Responsibilities

• Coordinate the remote tax pipeline and track status across ProSeries and Canopy

• Organize client documents and input critical tax data accurately

• Manage signature handling, e-file monitoring, and invoicing

• Communicate professionally with clients regarding missing documents or status updates

• Support the broader tax team to ensure zero missed deadlines



Who You Are

• Fast, detail-oriented, and highly organized

• Reliable and comfortable managing multiple moving parts in a digital environment

• A clear, professional communicator

• Aligned with our core values: Integrity, Communication, Accountability, Respect, Education



Requirements

• 2+ years in a tax support, administrative, or client services role in an accounting firm

• Proficiency with Google Workspace and practice management software (Canopy preferred)

• Understanding of tax firm workflows



Growth Opportunity

Tax Preparer / Enrolled Agent (EA) path



Compensation & Benefits

• Competitive pay

• 100% Remote work

• Dedicated training and career advancement



About TaxAce Group

TaxAce Group Inc. is a concierge luxury tax strategy firm serving business owners and high-net-worth individuals. We deliver sophisticated tax and accounting services with an uncompromising standard of care.



Apply

Apply via our careers portal:

title: E-commerce PPC & Keyword Strategist (Amazon Seller Central)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven, proactive and dedicated Amazon PPC & Account Manager to take ownership of our Amazon Seller Central account, with a primary focus on pay-per-click (PPC) campaign management, keyword research, and data-driven decision-making.



If you’re passionate about leveraging analytics, optimizing campaigns, and growing product visibility and sales on Amazon, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

-Manage and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.)

-Conduct in-depth keyword research to improve organic and paid rankings

-Analyze performance metrics (ACoS, TACoS, ROAS, CTR, CVR, etc.) and provide actionable insights

-Execute product listings optimizations (titles, bullets, backend keywords, etc.)

-Monitor and respond to account health issues, policy violations, and customer feedback

-Stay up-to-date on Amazon’s latest advertising features and platform changes

-Collaborate with internal team or clients on strategy, budgets, and reporting

-Perform competitor analysis to understand market trends and adapt PPC strategies accordingly.

-Generate detailed reports on campaign performance, interpreting key metrics to drive decisions and refine future strategies.



Requirements:

-Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

-Expertise in Parent-Child relationships within Amazon Seller Central to optimize product listings and variations.

-Hands-on experience with Amazon Ads and campaign optimization

-Strong proficiency in keyword tools (e.g., Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataDive, etc.)

-Analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

-Ability to interpret data and translate it into performance improvements

-Excellent communication and time management skills

-Detail-oriented, proactive, and results-driven with the ability to work independently.



Preferred Qualifications:

3+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts, with a focus on PPC, keyword research, and listing optimization.

In-depth knowledge of Amazon advertising tools, including Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display.

Experience with international Amazon marketplaces (UK, Canada, etc.) is a MUST.



Schedule is 9AM-6PM PST

title: Outbound Customer Insights Specialist (Telemarketing + User Research + Remote + US time)
description:
Fully Remote (must be available during US business hours, typically 8 AM – 5 PM EST / flexible within US time zones to align with target users)



Note: Upload a video to Google Drive to give an introduction about yourself and why you want to apply to this position.



* About the Role



We are looking for a sharp, proactive, and AI-savvy professional who thrives on reaching out to people, uncovering real problems, and turning those conversations into product-changing insights. This is not a traditional telemarketing or customer support role. You will run high-volume outbound calls and
s to US-based target users, dig deep into their daily workflows, and surface pain points that directly shape how our product is built. 



- Your critical thinking, observations, and recommendations will regularly influence the product roadmap.

- You will be the voice of the customer inside the company — someone who combines excellent outreach skills with strong analytical ability and fluency in AI tools to turn raw conversations into clear, actionable intelligence for the product team.



* Key Responsibilities



- Execute daily outbound calling and
ing campaigns to reach a high volume of target users in the US.

- Lead structured discovery conversations (phone +
) to identify workflow challenges, frustrations, and unmet needs.

- Document findings clearly and synthesize insights into concise reports, themes, and recommendations for the product, engineering, and design teams.

- Actively contribute ideas and suggestions that help shape product features and priorities.

- Use AI tools creatively and efficiently (e.g., for call/email personalization, conversation summarization, sentiment analysis, pattern detection, research, and follow-up automation).

- Track all interactions accurately.

- Meet weekly outreach and insight-quality targets while maintaining a professional, helpful, and engaging tone.

- Stay curious and continuously refine your approach based on what you learn from users.



* Requirements



- Strong critical thinking and analytical skills — you naturally spot patterns, ask great follow-up questions, and connect the dots between individual stories and broader product opportunities.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to quickly build rapport over the phone and in
.

- Proven experience in outbound calling, telemarketing, sales development, customer support, or user research (2+ years preferred).

- Fluent with AI tools at a practical level (you already use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar for research, writing, summarization, or automation and can learn new ones quickly).

- Highly self-motivated and comfortable working independently in a remote environment.

- Available and productive during US business hours.

- Passion for understanding how people work and a genuine desire to make products better through real user feedback.

- No specific degree required — we care about your ability to think, communicate, and deliver insights.



* Application

- In your, tell us about the amazing things you have done. 

- Show us your work ethnics. Tell us about how you work and what you would do to make your team respect and trust you.

title: E-commerce Listing & Marketplace Specialist
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized E-commerce Listing & Marketplace Specialist to manage product listings and support day-to-day operations across multiple online selling platforms. This role involves creating and maintaining listings, cross-posting inventory, managing customer interactions, and ensuring overall account performance.



Key Responsibilities:



Create accurate, compelling product listings on eBay, including titles, descriptions, pricing, and item specifics

Crosslist inventory to platforms such as Poshmark, Mercari, and others using crosslisting software tools

Manage and maintain eBay account health, ensuring compliance with platform policies and performance standards

Monitor and respond to customer inquiries in a timely and professional manner

Update existing listings, including pricing adjustments, inventory levels, and content improvements

Edit and enhance product images (cropping, background cleanup, lighting adjustments, etc.) to optimize presentation and sales

Track inventory across platforms to prevent overselling and maintain accuracy

Utilize crosslisting and inventory management software efficiently

Identify opportunities to improve listing quality, SEO, and overall sales performance



Qualifications:



Previous experience with e-commerce platforms (eBay required; Poshmark, Mercari, etc. preferred)

Familiarity with crosslisting tools and inventory management systems

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Basic photo editing skills (experience with tools like Photoshop, Canva, or similar)

Excellent written communication skills for product descriptions and customer service

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

Self-motivated and able to work independently



Preferred Skills:



Knowledge of e-commerce SEO and keyword optimization

Experience managing high-volume listings

Understanding of shipping workflows and order fulfillment processes

title: AI Specialist / Automation Expert (AI Agents for U.S. Debt Collection Company)
description:
Job Description:



We are a U.S.-based debt collection company looking to bring on a highly capable AI specialist to help us integrate artificial intelligence into our daily operations and develop custom AI agents.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems from the ground up and can take ideas and turn them into real, working solutions.



We operate in a compliance-driven environment, so attention to detail and structured thinking is important.



What You'll Be Doing:

Identify opportunities to use AI within a debt collection / accounts receivable environment



Build and deploy AI agents for:

Customer communication 
, SMS, chat — compliant messaging)

Internal workflows and automation

Data analysis and reporting (payments, accounts, trends)

Integrate AI tools with existing systems (CRM, spreadsheets, payment systems)

Help design systems that improve response rates and operational efficiency

Continuously optimize AI-driven processes



Tools / Skills (Preferred):

Experience with AI tools:

ChatGPT / OpenAI APIs

Claude, Gemini, or similar



Automation platforms:

Zapier, Make (Integromat), n8n, or similar

Basic coding (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

Experience building AI agents, chatbots, or workflow automations

Familiarity with CRMs, APIs, Google Sheets

Bonus: Experience in collections, fintech, or compliance-heavy industries

Important Note (Compliance):



This role involves working within a regulated industry (debt collection).

You do not need prior experience in collections, but you must be comfortable:



Following structured guidelines

Building systems that adhere to rules and compliance standards

Avoiding misleading or aggressive messaging in automation



What We're Looking For:

Someone who can think independently and problem-solve

Strong communicator (clear English)

Able to take a general idea and turn it into a working system

Detail-oriented and organized

Reliable and responsive

Interested in long-term work



Compensation:

Starting at $6–$10/hour depending on experience

Raises based on performance

Potential bonuses for successful AI implementations





Please include:



Your experience with AI and automation

Examples of systems, bots, or workflows you've built

What tools you prefer and why

A brief idea of how you would use AI in a collections or accounts receivable business



Bonus: Include the word "Compliance" in your subject line so I know you read everything.



Why This Role is Unique:



You’ll be helping build AI systems in an industry where very few companies are doing this well.

There is significant opportunity to create tools that directly impact revenue and performance.

title: SEO Specialist (On-Page & Off-Page) – Watch Brand (Remote)
description:
We are looking for an experienced **SEO Specialist** to help grow the online visibility of our watch brand, **Trémont**.



The goal of this role is to improve our presence on **Google search**, increase organic traffic, and build long-term SEO foundations that drive consistent growth.



This role requires someone who understands both **on-site SEO and off-site SEO**, and who can work strategically to improve rankings over time.



This is a **remote role** and we are looking for someone who can take ownership of the SEO strategy rather than simply follow instructions.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



• Conduct keyword research relevant to watches, fashion accessories, and lifestyle products

• Optimize website pages for SEO (titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal linking)

• Improve product page and collection page SEO

• Identify opportunities to rank for high-value search terms

• Develop and execute **off-page SEO strategies** (backlinks, outreach, partnerships)

• Work on improving the technical SEO health of the website

• Plan and optimize **blog content for SEO**

• Identify blog topics that can rank on Google and bring organic traffic

• Track SEO performance and recommend improvements

• Monitor competitors and identify ranking opportunities



---



**Blog Responsibilities**



You will also help guide our **in-house blog strategy**, including:



• Keyword research for blog articles

• SEO optimization for blog posts

• Suggesting article topics that attract organic search traffic

• Ensuring blog content supports SEO growth



---



**Requirements**



• Proven experience in SEO (please share examples of websites you have helped rank)

• Strong understanding of **on-page SEO and off-page SEO**

• Experience with keyword research tools

• Understanding of technical SEO fundamentals

• Experience working with Shopify websites is a plus

• Ability to explain SEO strategies clearly

• Strong English communication skills







**Nice to Have**



• Experience working with ecommerce brands

• Experience with fashion or watch brands

• Familiarity with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Google Search Console







**Compensation**



Starting at **$200/month** with opportunity to increase based on performance and results.







**IMPORTANT – APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS**



To be considered, please follow these instructions:



1. Start your application with the word **TREMONT**

2. Share **one example website you helped rank on Google**

3. Briefly explain **what you would do first to improve SEO for a watch brand**

4. Include your **expected monthly salary**



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Aesthetic Social Media Manager – Plastic Surgery (Before/After + Paid Ads + High-End Branding)
description:
We are a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice seeking a high-level Social Media Manager with experience in aesthetic medicine, before/after organization, and paid marketing (PPC). This role includes content creation, before/after photo management, and paid advertising. This is NOT a basic posting job. We are looking for someone who understands luxury branding and patient conversion.



Responsibilities: Create and manage Instagram, TikTok, and
 content. Produce high-end reels and posts that attract real patients. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic appropriate for a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice. Organize before and after photos systematically. Ensure proper lighting consistency, cropping, alignment, labeling, and categorization. Distribute before and after content across Instagram, TikTok,
, RealSelf, and provide to our website management team. Manage and run paid advertising campaigns on Instagram,
, and Google Ads for medspa and aesthetic services. Optimize campaigns for leads and conversions, not just clicks. Track and report performance.



Requirements: Experience with plastic surgery or medspa marketing. Strong understanding of before and after presentation. Experience running paid ads on Meta (Instagram/Facebook) and Google. Skilled in tools such as CapCut, Adobe, Photoshop or equivalent. Not Canva-only.



Do not apply if: You only use Canva templates. You have no before and after experience. You have never run paid ads. You cannot show real accounts you personally managed.



Required test: Create one Instagram post for a Beverly Hills plastic surgeon. 1) Before and after post using any sample images, must look real, clean, and high-end. 2) Write a professional caption including a call to action. 3) Provide one reel idea that would attract patients.



Required submission format: 1) Three Instagram accounts you personally managed. 2) One example of organized before and after work (folder system or samples). 3) One paid ad campaign you ran (results or screenshots preferred). 4) The test assignment. 5) List of tools you use.

title: AI Video Editor for Brands - Pixar Style Ads
description:
Hi there,



We are looking for an AI Video Editor (Pixar-style ads) to join our team for a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the sleep niche.



Important: there are required steps at the bottom of this job post. If you do not follow them, your application will not be reviewed, so please read everything carefully before applying. If this does not fit you, no worries at all — feel free to move on to another job post that suits you better :)



This is a part-time role to start, with the potential to grow into a full-time position.



Your role is straightforward:



We will provide:



- Scripts

- Voice-overs (in Dutch)

- Clear instructions and references



Your job is execution:



- Generate AI videos using OpenArt (Pixar-style characters)

- Create and maintain consistent Pixar-style characters

- Sync visuals with the provided voice-over

- Match the pacing and style of high-performing Pixar-style ads (fast, engaging, clean)

- Add accurate subtitles based on the script

- Deliver clean, high-quality video ads



You are not responsible for ideation. Your focus is execution and quality.



What we are looking for:



- Experience with video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar)

- Experience with AI-generated content (OpenArt or similar)

- Strong attention to detail (timing, subtitles, flow)

- Ability to replicate winning Pixar-style ad formats

- Fast communication and reliability



Mindset:



We do not work with a strict 9–5 mentality.



We move fast and sometimes need things outside standard hours.

We don’t expect you to be available all the time, but we do expect:



- Clear communication

- Flexibility when needed

- Someone who is proactive and wants to build with us



Mandatory (required to apply):



- Send us a Pixar-style ad (or similar AI-style ad) that you found online from a competitor or elsewhere, which you are confident you can recreate for our brand.

- Let us know clearly if you are available to work on Saturdays and/or Sundays (this is a big plus, but not required — we just need to know).



This helps us understand your taste and whether we are aligned.



Applications without BOTH of these will not be reviewed. If you prefer not to include this, feel free to apply to another role that fits you better :)



Please include:



- Your past work or portfolio

- The example ad mentioned above

- Your availability (hours per week)

- Any experience with AI tools (if applicable)



Looking forward to your application.

title: Gaming YouTube Script Writer (HSR, ZZZ, JRPGs)
description:
A dream job for a gamer who loves to write!



I run a growing YouTube channel focused on gacha games and JRPGs. I’m looking for a script writer who genuinely loves gaming and can turn messy, complex game info (kits, lore, story beats, community drama, patch changes) into scripts that are easy to follow, entertaining and accurate.



YOU WILL BE WRITING ACROSS:

- Zenless Zone Zero (required deep knowledge)

- Honkai: Star Rail (required deep knowledge)

- JRPGs and other upcoming games (example: a plot summary for a Dragon Quest remaster)

- Future games (example: Ananta)



One week you might write a ZZZ character lore breakdown and a “push or skip” video for Honkai Star Rail. The next week you might write a story summary or “what you need to know” video for a completely different game.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Write YouTube scripts for:



- Character guides, lore explainers, “pull or skip”, patch overviews and other stuff that audiences might like

- Plot summaries and recaps (spoiler-safe when required)

- Short-form scripts (Shorts/Reels style)

- Take complicated mechanics or lore and make them simple for everyday viewers

- Match different tones depending on the audience and video goal (funny, serious, hype, explanatory, story-time)

- Suggest video opportunities based on what’s trending in the games we cover (patch cycles, banners, drama, community interest, search demand)



REQUIRED:

- No agency submissions - I’m looking for individuals who want to be part of a team yet enjoy working from home

- No AI-written scripts: when it comes to game guides, AI is often inaccurate and misses nuance. I’m hiring a human writer for a reason.

- Strong existing knowledge of Zenless Zone Zero and Honkai: Star Rail, including characters and lore (you will be asked specific questions to confirm this)

- Adaptable to learning new games fast

- Able to write clearly and logically, with strong pacing and hooks

- Fast delivery without sacrificing quality

- A PC, mobile device or console capable of playing the games we cover (ZZZ, HSR, and upcoming titles). Must be able to easily download and play new games that may need coverage.



NICE TO HAVE:

- A sense of humour 

- You already watch gaming YouTube and understand retention, hooks, pacing and “why people keep watching”

- You write and read A LOT

- You can pitch strong titles hooks, and thumbnail text options



PAY STRUCTURE (PATHWAY):

This role starts as per-script, with clear upside for great work.



Step 1: 8-week paid trial (pay-per-script)



- Pay per script based on length/format

- Clear deadlines agreed before each script

- Must be open to revisions and feedback (especially the first few weeks to get the tone of voice right with the YouTube channel)



Step 2: If we work well together



- We move to a small monthly retainer for a set number of scripts (still part-time), with extra scripts priced at the same per-script rate.



To apply: include your preferred rates for:



1. Your per-script rate (in PHP) for each format:



3–5 min script: $___

6–10 min script: $___

10–30 min script: $___



2. Your preferred monthly retainer after the trial (and what it includes):



“$___/month for ___ scripts” (tell me the mix and revision limits)





HOW TO APPLY



Send:

 1. A short intro about you and your gaming background

 2. Your writing samples (scripts preferred, otherwise any strong writing)

 3. Your rates per script length (listed above)

 4. Your weekly availability and typical turnaround time per script

 5. Confirm what device you use to play ZZZ/HSR (PC/mobile/console)

 6. Answer the short TEST TASKS below (copy/paste responses in your application)





TEST TASKS:

1. What’s your Honkai Star Rail or Zenless Zone Zero UID and region?

2.Describe the entire plot of Honkai Star Rail’s Amphoreus in 3 sentences or less. And make it personal and funny.

3. What's your favourite side quest in HSR or ZZZ, and why?

4. What’s the first JRPG you ever played, and what did you enjoy most about it?

5. Writing task: In
words only, explain how Honkai Star Rail’s Cyrene works to a brand new player.



NO AI-WRITTEN RESPONSES PLEASE! Any AI detection will result in the immediate rejection of your application.

title: CAREER OPPORTUNITY »» Content Quality Analyst ¤ Full Time ¤
description:
We’re hiring a Content Quality Analyst to help ensure the quality and consistency of web content across our firm’s website. This junior-level role is well-suited for someone who’s detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working within legal subject matters. You should be confident reviewing content with a critical eye, open to learning, and willing to speak up when you spot issues or areas for improvement. You’ll also work with other teams to keep everything consistent and up to standard across the site. A legal background isn’t required, but the ability to understand legal concepts and apply established guidelines accurately is essential.



Ready to Apply?

Send your resume to 



Key Responsibilities:

-Review web content for legal marketing compliance, factual and conceptual accuracy, grammar, and readability.

-Conduct regular audits of web pages for both content and technical issues.

-Ensure SEO best practices are implemented throughout all content (keywords, meta tags, headers, etc.).

-Perform basic technical checks (e.g., internal links, alt text, metadata, formatting).

-Coordinate with different teams to ensure consistent application of content standards.

-Track content updates and maintain documentation of reviews and recommendations.

-Support the development of internal content standards and style guides.



Qualifications And Skills:

-Excellent attention to detail and the ability to identify content inconsistencies or errors.

-Strong organizational and time management skills.

-Ability to follow complex editorial, legal, and brand standards accurately.

-Fast learner with the ability to adapt to legal content and digital platforms.

-Strong written communication and analytical skills.

-Familiarity with legal terminology, especially in the U.S. legal landscape (preferred).

-Understanding of basic website development concepts such as HTML tags and page structure (preferred).



Basic Requirements:

-Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

-Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection in case of outages



Work Details:

-Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

-Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

-Stable employment

-Competitive salary

-Bi-monthly salary

-A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

-Work-life balance 

-Work-from-home opportunity



Virtual Office Setup: We ask tea
mbers to maintain a virtual office via Google Meet with cameras on during work hours. This helps us simulate an in-office environment, encourages collaboration, and ensures everyone is present and engaged throughout the day, even while working remotely.



Note: The company uses a time tracker to ensure productivity and accountability.



Direct Hire:

This is a direct hire position — you will be employed and managed directly by our company, not through an agency or third party.



Important Note:

Do not send your application via our social media platforms or website contact forms. Failure to follow this instruction may result in disqualification.

title: Real Estate Operations Coordinator – Top 10 Advance!
description:
Real Estate Operations Coordinator – Top 10 Advance!



We’re a fast-growing land investing company, and we need someone to bring structure and 
ntum to our operations. You’ll work directly with the owner, be involved in real deals, and help us scale. You’ll also support our rental property business as needed.



If you’re organized, proactive, and excited to use AI to solve problems and move faster — we’ll give you the tools and opportunity to grow. This role has the potential to become an Operations Manager position as we scale.





What You’ll Be Doing



- Bookkeeping — categorize expenses, reconcile accounts, keep clean financials in QuickBooks

- Transaction coordination — work with title companies, vendors, and county offices to keep deals moving

- Follow-up & accountability — make sure tasks and deadlines don’t slip across the team

- KPI tracking — build simple reports so we always know where things stand

- Research — find realtors, vendors, and service providers as needed

- CRM management — keep deal data accurate and organized

- Automation — use AI tools to eliminate repetitive work and improve efficiency



You’re a Fit If Your



- Organized and detail-obsessed

- Proactive — you follow up without being asked

- Resourceful — you figure things out and get it done

- Comfortable making calls and working with professionals

- Ownership mindset — you don’t need daily hand-holding

- Growth-oriented — you want to learn and take on more over time

QuickBooks experience is a plus, but not required if you’re willing to learn.



The Details



- Full-time, US business hours, remote

- Reports to the owner, working alongside our sales lead

- Compensation: Competitive, based on experience



How to Apply

We don’t hire off resumes — we hire off results.



Complete our skills challenge. See your score and live ranking instantly on our public leaderboard. **Top 10 advance to a paid project task.**



[START THE CHALLENGE USING LINK BELOW]







We’re growing fast — show us you can grow with us.

title: Media Buyer (Facebook Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping
description:
Media Buyer 
 Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping



Remote • Part-time to Full-time Path



About Us

We’re a fast-growing e-commerce group operating multiple dropshipping brands. We combine rapid testing, sharp creative, and rigorous analytics to launch products that delight customers. You’ll join a lean, ambitious team where your work directly impacts revenue—and where high performers grow quickly.



The Role



As a Media Buyer, you’ll own the end-to-end execution of
 (Meta) acquisition campaigns across several storefronts. You’ll launch and scale daily tests, safeguard account health, and collaborate closely with our CEO, creative, and operations teams to hit revenue and efficiency targets.



What You’ll Do

- Plan, build, and launch campaigns in
 Ads Manager daily (audiences, budgets, placements, tracking).

- Manage and pace budgets against KPIs; reallocate spend toward winners in real time.

- QA all assets and flows pre-launch (ad copy/creatives, URLs, pixels, events, landing pages, checkout).

- Moderate ad comments (hide/delete/reply as appropriate) to protect brand and conversion.

- Monitor account health, policy compliance, and limits; escalate risks early.

- Maintain clear performance reporting in Google Sheets; summarize insights and next steps.

- Partner with the CEO, video editor, and EA; attend a weekly stand-up with concise updates.

- Proactively propose tests (creatives, angles, audiences, funnels) and process improvements.

- Stable account health and policy compliance.



What You Bring

- Minimum IQ of 120

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- 2+ years hands-on media buying for E-commerce on
/Meta (dropshipping experience is a plus).

- Strong performance marketing mindset: comfortable with hypotheses, rapid testing, and data-driven decisions.

- Advanced Ads Manager skills; working knowledge of Events Manager, pixels/API, ad account, audiences, and attribution.

- High attention to detail; excellent written English; organized and deadline-reliable.

- Ownership mentality—able to work independently, surface risks, and take initiative without micromanagement.

- Comfortable with Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, basic charting) and structured reporting.

- Note on assessments: We value analytical thinking. Short skills/aptitude tasks may be part of our selection process.



How We Work (and What You’ll Get)

- Part-time with flexible hours, results-oriented culture; path to full-time for top performers.

- Compensation: $5/hour to start + performance bonuses.

- Approved expense reimbursement.

- Merit-based raises as your impact grows.

- Access to proven SOP's, fast feedback loops, and direct collaboration with leadership.

- Real growth opportunities: broaden into creative strategy  or team management as we scale.



How to Apply

- Put your favorite animal in the subject line/title—this helps us spot detail-oriented applicants.

Please include:

- Your CV/Resume.

- Links or screenshots of recent e-commerce campaigns you’ve managed (redact sensitive data).

- A short paragraph on why you’re the best fit, including your typical testing framework (budget per test, iteration cadence, success/fail criteria).

- Your availability (hours per week) 

- Your IQ in your account (you can do this for free on onlinejobs)



No AI-generated applications—we read closely and can tell.



We’re excited to meet driven marketers who want to grow with us and take real ownership. If that sounds like you, let’s talk.

title: AI Automation Developer
description:
About Us

We're a fast-moving cosmetics brand named Faccelove that uses AI to automate as much of our operations as possible — from creative production to internal workflows to customer-facing systems. We don't just use AI tools; we build custom AI-powered systems that run autonomously. We're looking for a developer who can become our go-to person for building these systems across the business.



What You'll Work On: 

This isn't a single project — it's an ongoing role building AI-powered automation across different areas of the business. Examples of what we need built:

- Autonomous creative pipelines that generate complete ads (visuals, video, copy, editing) from a single brief (Most urgent)

- Internal workflow automation — connecting tools, databases, and AI models to eliminate manual work

- AI agents that handle repetitive business processes end-to-end without human intervention

- Custom integrations between third-party AI services (image generation, video generation, LLMs) and our internal systems

- Data pipelines, dashboards, and reporting tools powered by AI analysis

- Customer-facing AI features — chatbots, personalized content, intelligent recommendations



New projects come up regularly. You'll need to be someone who can take a business problem, figure out the best way to solve it with AI and automation, and build it.



What We're Looking For

Must-have:

- Experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar)

- Strong Python and/or TypeScript — production-grade, not just prototypes

- Experience with LLM APIs: tool use, function calling, structured outputs, prompt engineering

- Ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple APIs into automated pipelines

- Full-stack capability — you can build both the backend logic and a functional frontend when needed

- Self-starter mindset — you take a problem, propose a solution, and build it without hand-holding



Nice-to-have:

- Experience with generative media APIs (image gen, video gen, AI editing tools)

- DevOps skills (Docker, CI/CD, cloud deployment)

- Database design and management (PostgreSQL, Supabase, vector databases)

- Experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or custom LLM tool integrations

- Background in n8n, Make, or other automation platforms (we prefer custom-built, but it helps to know the landscape)





Tech We Use

Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST APIs, various generative AI services



What Makes This Role Different

This isn't a one-off gig. We want someone who grows with us and becomes the person who knows our systems inside and out. You'll have real ownership over what you build, input on what we should build next, and the freedom to propose solutions we haven't thought of yet.



To Apply

Tell us:

1. What's the most interesting AI automation you've built? (link or description)

2. What's your availability and preferred working arrangement?

3. Your expected hourly/monthly salary

s that drive meeting bookings.

mber, making outbound calls every day.

.” Show how you would respond and continue the conversation!

title: Owner Relations Property Manager
description:
Navigate Stays is seeking a dedicated Owner Property Manager to serve as the primary point of contact for property owners. This role is responsible for conducting owner phone calls, managing owner relationships, tracking and resolving owner-reported issues, and ensuring exceptional communication and service delivery.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Owner Communication & Relationship Management



Conduct scheduled and ad-hoc phone calls with property owners

Serve as primary point of contact for owner inquiries, concerns, and feedback

Build and maintain strong, trust-based relationships with property owners

Proactively update owners on property performance, bookings, and issues

Handle owner concerns with professionalism, empathy, and urgency



2. Issue Tracking & Resolution



Track all owner-reported issues in the property management system

Document issues thoroughly with details, timelines, and priority levels

Coordinate with internal teams (maintenance, cleaning, guest services) to resolve issues

Follow up with owners to ensure issues are resolved to their satisfaction

Escalate complex or urgent issues to leadership as needed



3. Owner Support & Service



Answer owner questions about bookings, property performance, operations

Address billing inquiries and coordinate with accounting team

Educate owners on Navigate Stays processes, policies, and best practices

Gather owner feedback and identify opportunities for service improvement



4. Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of all owner communications and issues

Update property management system with owner preferences, notes, and issue status

Generate reports on owner satisfaction, common issues, and resolution times

Participate in tea
etings to share owner insights and trends





REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:

? Excellent verbal and written communication skills

? Strong customer service orientation with focus on relationship building

? Ability to handle difficult conversations with professionalism and empathy

? Highly organized with strong attention to detail

? Ability to manage multiple priorities and follow up consistently

? Proficiency with property management software, or willingness to learn

? Problem-solving mindset and ability to work independently

? Professional phone presence and active listening skills



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:



Experience in property management, hospitality, or customer success

Familiarity with vacation rental operations and owner expectations

Experience using Guesty, EzAide, or similar property management platforms

Background in account management or client relations





KEY COMPETENCIES:

Communication Excellence

Ability to communicate clearly, professionally, and empathetically with property owners across various situations—from routine updates to sensitive issue resolution.

Relationship Management

Skilled at building trust and rapport with owners, understanding their needs and concerns, and maintaining positive long-term relationships.

Issue Resolution

Proactive approach to identifying, tracking, and resolving owner issues efficiently while keeping all parties informed throughout the process.

Organizational Skills

Ability to manage multiple owner accounts, track numerous issues simultaneously, and maintain detailed documentation without losing track of priorities.

Empathy & Patience

Understands that property owners have significant financial investment in their properties and can navigate emotional conversations with care and professionalism.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

? Owners feel heard, valued, and confident in Navigate Stays' management

? Owner-reported issues are tracked, resolved promptly, and followed up on consistently

? Owner satisfaction scores and retention rates improve over time

? Clear documentation allows anyone on the team to understand owner history

? Owners proactively refer new property owners to Navigate Stays



WORK ENVIRONMENT:



Must be available for scheduled owner calls during business hours

Collaborative team environment with regular check-ins and support

Access to property management software, CRM tools, and communication platforms





HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role to:

title: AI UGC Video Creative Strategist (Meta Ads – E-commerce)
description:
We're looking for a highly experienced AI UGC Creative Strategist who can create and guide ads that scale profitably on Meta.



This is NOT basic editing.

This is NOT organic content.



We run high-spend, direct response campaigns that generate real revenue.



You will be responsible for:



Creating and producing AI UGC style ads (realistic, high-converting)

Developing angles, hooks, and scripts

Turning ideas into ads that perform at scale

Editing and refining videos when needed

Creating realistic scenarios (e.g. store owner showing products, storytelling style ads)



You must already understand how to:



Create realistic AI UGC videos

Use tools like VEO3, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, and similar AI video/voice tools

Apply lip sync, voiceovers, and editing to make ads feel real and natural



We are currently doing $300K–$500K/month in revenue, so there is a lot of volume and testing.



We are NOT looking to train someone. You must already be operating at a high level.

We need someone who can plug in immediately and perform.



Compensation



We offer a 2000$ monthly salary + high performance bonuses.



This means:



You earn bonuses on winning creatives

This can be:

Fixed bonus per winning ad

Or a % of ad spend



Top performers in our team earn more than standard fixed salary roles because of this structure.



Requirements

Proven experience with AI UGC ad creation for Meta ads

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.)

Experience with lip sync, voiceovers, and realistic AI avatars

Ability to create ads that feel authentic and not “AI-generated”

Strong understanding of hooks, angles, and direct response marketing

Experience working with e-commerce brands (Shopify, DTC)

Ability to work fast and produce consistently





Big Plus



Experience creating storefront / owner-style ads

Experience with performance marketing teams

Understanding of what makes ads scale (not just look good)

Experience with high-volume creative production





Do NOT Apply If:



You only have basic video editing experience

You have no experience with AI UGC tools

You need training or guidance to get started

You cannot show real examples of ads you created





To Apply



Send a message with:



Short intro — your experience with AI UGC and Meta ads

2–3 examples of AI UGC ads you created (with results if possible)

Tools you use (VEO3, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

Your expected monthly salary in USD



Important: Include the word “SCALE” in your application so we know you read everything.



No examples = no response.

title: Video Editor for Real Estate Videos & Social Media (Full-Time, $900–$1200)
description:

Our content includes:

-Real estate listing videos

-Social media reels (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

-Talking-head and marketing content



We are looking for a full-time remote video editor who can deliver consistent, high-quality work with fast turnaround times.

This is a production-focused role — you will be editing daily.



Key Responsibilities

-Edit real estate listing videos (clean, bright, professional style)

-Edit short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) with strong pacing and engagement

-Apply basic storytelling to improve flow and viewer retention

-Perform audio editing (music selection, leveling, clean sound)

-Color correct footage for a modern real estate look

-Add titles, transitions, and effects (MotionVFX or similar tools)

-Follow clear editing guidelines and examples

-Organize files and maintain clean workflows

-Implement feedback quickly and accurately



Required Skills

-Strong experience with professional editing software: 

Final Cut Pro or Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

Strong understanding of:

-Short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

-Pacing and timing

-Good audio editing skills

-High attention to detail

-Ability to follow instructions exactly

-Reliable high-speed internet for large file transfers



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience with Final Cut Pro or DaVinci

Experience with MotionVFX or similar plugins

Experience editing real estate content

Experience with AI-enhanced editing or effects (or willingness to learn)

Experience with 3D text, motion graphics, or advanced titles

Experience working with remote teams



Performance Expectations

-Full-time (40 hours per week)

-Edit multiple projects per day

-Most projects completed within 24 hours

-Maintain consistent quality and style across all videos



Compensation & Benefits

-Starting pay: $900/month

-Clear growth path to $1,200+ based on performance

-Consistent, long-term full-time work

-13th Month Bonus (prorated)



Hours: 1am-9am Eastern Daylight Time (1pm-9pm Philippines time). 



Raises are based on:

-Quality

-Speed

-Reliability

-Ability to follow instructions

-High performers can advance quickly.



Included Benefits

-$50/month allowance for internet/health care

-All required tools provided:

-Dropbox

-Editing software

-AI tools

-Music subscriptions



To apply:

Send 2–3 sample edits

Send a short intro video

Include the phrase: “blue house” in your message



Applications without portfolio and video introduction will not be considered.

title: Operations Lead - Marketing & Conversion Strategy
description:
Application Link: 
/EmFAppF



OVERVIEW

We're looking for an Operations Lead to own and scale the revenue engine across our creator portfolio.



This is not a VA role. This is for a Growth Marketer who understands funnels, conversion, and customer psychology — and knows how to turn that into measurable revenue.



You won't be doing manual execution. You'll be designing the systems and strategies that drive performance, working through a team of VAs.



Your success is measured by one thing: revenue growth.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

> Funnel Architecture - Design and optimize the full subscriber journey — from acquisition through retention.

> Messaging & Monetization - Own the structure, cadence, and performance of messaging across all creators.

> Lifecycle Marketing - Build and refine welcome flows, re-engagement, re-subscription, and win-back campaigns.

> Performance Optimization - Track conversion metrics, identify gaps, and continuously improve pricing, offers, and messaging.

> Team Leadership - Lead a team of VAs to execute your strategy with speed and consistency.





WHO YOU ARE

> Growth-Focused Marketer - You understand funnels, conversion triggers, and how to move people from interest to action.

> Systems Thinker - You think in angles and structure — not just individual messages. You build, not just write.

> Data-Driven Operator - You use metrics to identify problems and drive decisions. Gut feel is backed by numbers.

> Ownership Mentality - You take responsibility for outcomes, not just execution. Results are your accountability.

> Relevant Experience - Background in high-volume digital sales, e-commerce, or direct response marketing. OF experience is a plus, not required.



THE OFFER

>Base Salary - $1,200 – $1,600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Directly tied to revenue growth and portfolio performance

> Growth Path - Direct path to senior leadership as the operation scales

> Environment - Fully remote, performance-focused





This is a performance-driven role with real upside. High performers grow their compensation in line with the revenue they generate.

title: Have a Business — or Want to Start One? Let’s Build It (Shark Tank Style)
description:
I’m looking for serious, driven individuals — especially based in the Philippines or working online — who either:



Already have a business

OR

Have a strong idea and want to build one

This is not a job. This is an opportunity to build something real together.



 What I Want From You

Think Shark Tank style — clear, honest, and to the point.

1. Tell me about YOU

Who are you?

What skills do you have?

What have you done before (work, business, freelancing, etc.)?

2. Your BUSINESS (or idea)

Do you already have a business? If yes, explain it.

If not, what do you want to start?

Why this business?

3. COST

How much money do you need to start or grow?

What will the money be used for?

4. CLIENTS

How will we get customers?

Be specific 
, cold outreach, referrals, ads, etc.)

5. MONEY

How much can this realistically make per month?

Break it down simple.



What I’m Looking For

Simple, clear ideas (not overcomplicated)

People who take action, not just talk

Online businesses or Philippines-based operations preferred

Must be legal and done in good faith

 What Happens Next

If your idea or business makes sense:

I may help fund it

I may help grow it

We build it together and scale

 

Final Note

Don’t overthink it. Simple wins.

Send your idea like you’re pitching for real money.

Let’s see what you’ve got.

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.



If that excites you, apply. If it scares you, even better - apply anyway.

title: Associate Attorney | USA HOURS
description:
Hi, do you have drafting and case management experience along with very good English? Are you detail oriented, organized, and friendly?



Our law firm is looking for someone to support our attorneys with case and motion drafting, preparing and filing cases, proactively managing the progress of a case, tracking deadlines, case and law research, and negotiating settlements. We value thoughtful, well spoken, and curious people that want to grow with the firm. This is a long term, full time position working US hours (we're 13 hours behind).



We're a growing US law firm and offer job security, good pay, long term potential. Everyone is treated respectfully and encouraged to share any ideas on how to improve the business and the work is meaningful as we help people that need our help. You will work with a team of ph VAs as well as our USA based team.



We are a performance based team where everyone's contributions are important. Our culture is positive and professional and we thrive in delivering an outstanding customer experience to our clients.



We are looking for candidates with 2-5 years of experience as an attorney. Attention to detail and a growth mindset are a must. 



We defend clients being sued by financial companies, and turn around and sue those same companies under federal laws including the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act and Fair Credit Reporting Act as well as Illinois state laws like the Debt Settlement Consumer Protection Act and Illinois Consumer Fraud Act. Don't worry, we will teach you.



Look us up at 
 and check out our google reviews to see what our clients think of us. If this sounds like something you'd like to talk more about please apply through onlinejobs.ph with your resume and a link to a short video 30-60 seconds in length introducing yourself and why you are interested in working with our firm.

title: AI Agent Developer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a developer who lives at the intersection of AI and automation. You'll design and build fully autonomous creative pipelines that take a single prompt and produce complete, polished advertisements — visuals, video, copy, and editing — with no manual intervention and other sorts of Ai agents that helps our beauty brand Faccelove function more efficiently. 



You'll work with Claude Code as the orchestration backbone, integrating third-party generative AI services (NanoBanana for image generation, Higgsfield for AI video, and others) into seamless, production-grade workflows. The end goal: a system where a human provides a brief and gets back a finished creative asset.



What You'll Build

- Autonomous AI agent pipelines using Claude Code that chain together multiple generative AI services end-to-end

- API integrations with image generation (NanoBanana), video generation (Higgsfield), and editing/post-production tools

- Prompt engineering systems that translate high-level creative briefs into structured, multi-step agent workflows

- Quality control and feedback loops — automated checks that evaluate outputs and retry/refine when needed

- Robust error handling, state management, and logging for complex multi-API orchestration





Requirements (Must-Have)

- Hands-on experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar frameworks)

- Strong proficiency in Python and/or TypeScript — you write clean, production-grade code, not just scripts

- Experience with LLM APIs: function calling / tool use, structured outputs, prompt chaining, and multi-turn orchestration

- Proven ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple third-party APIs in a single automated pipeline

- Solid understanding of async programming, error handling, retry logic, and building resilient systems



Nice-to-Have

- Familiarity with generative media APIs — image generation, video generation, or AI-driven editing tools

- Experience with creative production workflows (advertising, content creation, or media post-production)

- Background in MCP (Model Context Protocol), tool servers, or building custom tool integrations for LLMs



Tech Stack

- Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, NanoBanana, Higgsfield, MCP, REST APIs, Webhooks, Git



What Sets You Apart

You don't just use AI tools — you build systems that make AI tools work together autonomously. You've shipped at least one project where an AI agent completes a multi-step task end-to-end without human intervention. You understand that the hardest part isn't the individual API calls — it's the orchestration, the edge cases, and making the whole pipeline reliable at scale.



You're comfortable in ambiguity. This space is new and moving fast. You'll often be the first person to figure out how to make two services talk to each other in a way nobody has documented yet.

title: AI Operations Builder
description:
We're a small US-based agency (NVZN) that helps small businesses get their operations in order. We build websites, custom dashboards, and backend automations for our clients. We need a technical builder to work alongside the founder on the build side of projects.



This is NOT a traditional developer role. We "vibe code" - meaning we use AI tools (primarily Claude Code) to build things fast. You describe what you want, the AI writes the code, you test it, iterate, and ship. If you've never used Claude Code or AI-assisted coding, this isn't the right fit.



What you'll be building:



Client websites (Astro, React, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel)

Custom command center dashboards (Next.js, Supabase)

Backend automations using n8n, 
, and Zapier

GoHighLevel workflows (pipelines, triggers, webhooks, SMS sequences)

API integrations between tools (webhooks, REST APIs, OAuth flows)



Must-have skills:



Experience with Claude Code or similar AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot) — you need to be comfortable building with AI, not writing everything from scratch

n8n workflow building (our primary automation platform)


 scenario building

GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, triggers)

Basic web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, React) or the ability to build well with claude code

Comfortable with Git, terminal commands, and deploying to Vercel

Can work US Mountain Time hours (at least 4-hour overlap)



Nice to have:



Zapier experience

Supabase / PostgreSQL

Astro framework

API debugging and webhook troubleshooting



How we work:



You'll get detailed specs or plans for what needs to be built

You build it using Claude Code and your own skills

We review together, iterate, and ship

Communication is async (WhatsAPP) with weekly video calls



We move fast and keep things simple



This is a long-term contract role with the opportunity to move into a full-time position in the coming months. We're looking for someone reliable, sharp, and self-directed who wants to grow with a small agency. If you need hand-holding on every task, this isn't it.

title: Content & Workbook Creation VA (AI + Transcripts ? Downloadable Workbook)
description:
I’m looking for a detail-oriented, reliable VA to help turn video content into a clear, structured workbook.



You will be working with approximately:



9 videos (~6 hours total)

Additional PDFs and resources I provide



Some of the content includes Q&A, so part of your role is organizing what’s useful and structuring it clearly.



This role uses AI tools (like ChatGPT) to speed up the process, but you still need good judgment to organize the information into something clean, clear, and usable.



Scope of Work:



Generate transcripts from provided videos (using tools — not manual typing)

Use ChatGPT (or similar AI tools) to extract and organize key content

Turn transcripts into a structured workbook (not just summaries — organized, usable material)

Incorporate additional resources (links, tools, instructions) into the content

Format everything cleanly in Google Docs

Ensure the document is easy to follow, well structured, and consistent throughout



Important:



You do NOT need to watch every video in full. This role is about working efficiently with transcripts and organizing information clearly using AI tools.



This is not a copy/paste task — I am looking for someone who can organize information and present it clearly.



Final Deliverable:



A clean, well-structured workbook in Google Docs that:



Is clearly organized with sections and headings

Includes prompts, summaries, or exercises where appropriate

Has consistent formatting throughout

Is easy to edit in Google Docs and can be converted directly into a downloadable PDF



Timeline:



Must be completed within 7 days



Compensation:



Fixed project rate (please include your quote)

Opportunity for ongoing work if it’s a good fit



Tools:



ChatGPT (or similar AI tools)

Google Docs

Transcription tools (your choice)



Who This Is For:



This role is a strong fit if you:



Are highly organized and detail-oriented

Can take AI-generated content and turn it into something clear and structured

Are comfortable using ChatGPT or similar tools daily

Think in terms of structure, not just tasks

Take ownership and produce clean, high-quality work



To Apply:



At the top of your application, write: READY



Then answer:



What tools would you use to generate transcripts from videos?

How would you use AI to turn transcripts into a structured workbook?

Share an example of a document or project where you organized complex information.



Notes:



Please only apply if you can complete this within the timeline and are comfortable working independently.



Reliable internet connection required.

title: Accountant / Accounts Assistant
description:
Here’s the final version with that requirement clearly embedded and positioned to filter properly:



---



## **NDIS Accountant Assistant (Accounts Receivable, Bookkeeping & Payroll Support)**



We are an Australian-based healthcare and disability services business seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Accountant Assistant to support our day-to-day financial operations.



This is a hands-on role focused on maintaining strong cash flow, accurate financial records, and clean payroll processes. You will play a key role in ensuring the financial side of the business runs efficiently.



We are looking for someone dependable, proactive, and interested in long-term growth within the business.



---



### **Your Core Responsibilities**



**Accounts Receivable (Daily Priority)**



* Monitor outstanding invoices and follow up daily

* Call and
 plan managers and clients to chase overdue payments

* Maintain clear records of all follow-ups and outcomes

* Identify and escalate payment risks early



**Bookkeeping**



* Maintain accurate financial records

* Reconcile transactions and ensure data integrity

* Assist with invoicing and tracking financial performance



**Payroll Support (Fortnightly)**



* Prepare payroll data for review

* Scrutinise timesheets and identify inconsistencies

* Receive and organise payroll-related requests from staff

* Assist in ensuring payroll is processed accurately and on time



**Expense Management**



* Review and assess employee expense requests

* Ensure all claims are valid, reasonable, and supported

* Prepare summaries for approval



**Reporting**



* Generate clear, structured reports on receivables, payroll issues, and expenses

* Track outstanding invoices and actions taken

* Highlight problems and recommend solutions



---



### **Key Requirements**



* Strong experience in bookkeeping, accounts receivable, or accounting support

* Confident making outbound calls to follow up unpaid invoices

* **Must be able to use VOIP systems to make outbound calls reliably**

* High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

* Reliable and able to work independently

* Strong written and spoken English

* Comfortable using spreadsheets and online systems

* **Must be available to work Monday to Friday, 9:00am to 5:00pm AEST (Australian time)**



---



### **Highly Valued Experience (Bonus)**



* Experience with **MYOB**

* Experience with **ShiftCare**

* Familiarity with **NDIS Plan Management, NDIA processes, or PRODA**

* Previous experience chasing overdue invoices in an Australian business



---



### **Work Details**



* Full-time role

* Monday to Friday, 9:00am to 5:00pm AEST

* Long-term position with growth opportunities

* Paid weekly



---



### **Important**



This role involves daily follow-up of unpaid invoices. You must be comfortable having firm, professional conversations about payments and deadlines.



---



### **To Apply**



Please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with accounts receivable and bookkeeping

3. An example of how you handled overdue payments

4. Confirmation of your VOIP setup and calling experience

5. Your internet reliability and backup options

6. Your availability for an interview



---



If you are dependable, detail-focused, and take ownership of your work, we want to hear from you.

title: Google VEO 3 Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Google Veo 3 Specialist



Our fast-growing e-commerce brand is scaling toward 8-figures and beyond, and we’re ready to level up our creative production with the power of Google Veo 3. We’re looking for a Google Veo 3 Specialist to help us manage, refine, and execute AI-generated video ads that support our marketing goals.



To show you’ve carefully read this post, please start your response with the word peach before introducing yourself. Below, you’ll find the key responsibilities, requirements, and a few quick questions so we can get to know your experience.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prompt Creation & Optimization: Write, test, and refine prompts to generate high-quality video ads using Google Veo 3.

- Workflow Coordination: Manage the full AI production pipeline—concept to final output—ensuring deadlines are met.

- Creative Alignment: Collaborate with our marketing and UGC teams to blend AI-generated content with human-made assets.

- Quality Review: Ensure all outputs are polished, on-brand, and ready for launch.

- Innovation & Mastery: Stay up to date with Google Veo 3 features, updates, and best practices to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Documentation: Maintain a clear system for tracking prompts, revisions, and final deliverables.



Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with Google Veo 3 and AI video generation.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple creative projects at once.

- Good communication skills for working with both AI and human creators.

- Comfortable using project management tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or similar.

- Consistent availability for 8 hours daily, 6 days per week.

- Bonus: Background in marketing, video production, or AI prompt engineering.



Questions for You:

- Have you worked directly with Google Veo 3 before? If so, tell us about your projects.

- How do you approach prompt testing and refining to get the best results?

- What’s your system for keeping multiple AI video projects organized?

- Are you comfortable balancing both creative expectations and technical workflows?

- Can you commit to 8 hours per day, 6 days per week, for this role?



If you’re passionate about AI-powered creativity and love working with cutting-edge tools like Google Veo 3, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Experienced Media Buyer for DTC Brand (Meta Ads)

Campaign structure

Scaling strategy

Performance stability



???? Primary Outcome



Scale ad spend from:



$2.5k/day ? $10k–$20k/day+



While maintaining strong efficiency and stability.



?? Current Setup (So You Know What You’re Walking Into)

Meta Ads only (for now)

Single CBO that handles both testing + scaling

Strong creative pipeline (this is our edge)

Consistent profitability (~4.8x ROAS)



We are looking to:



Increase creative volume significantly

Break out winners and scale more aggressively (using ABO structures)



???? Responsibilities

Manage and optimize Meta ad account daily

Scale budgets without tanking performance (currently scaling 20%/day)

Identify winning creatives quickly and allocate spend accordingly

Test and implement new campaign structures 

Improve stability as spend increases

Work closely with creative strategist (me) to give feedback on what’s converting

Make fast, data-driven decisions



? What we're looking for

Has scaled DTC brands to $20k/day+ spend on Meta

Strong understanding of creative-driven performance (this is NOT a technical-only account)

Knows how to:

Scale winning ads

Control CPA while increasing spend

Handle volatility at higher budgets

Comfortable working with:

CBO + ABO strategies

Fast testing environments

Moves fast and communicates clearly

Doesn’t need hand-holding



? Disqualifiers

Agency juniors / button-clickers

People who rely on slow testing cycles

Overly “safe” media buyers who can’t scale aggressively

Anyone without real DTC scaling experience

???? Compensation



Flexible depending on experience:



Base retainer

Performance incentives (based on spend / revenue / ROAS targets)



We want someone who is aligned with growth, not just a flat fee operator.



???? Why This Role Is Different

You are not fixing a broken account — you are scaling a winning one

Creative is handled at a high level (your job is to leverage it)

Clear goal: push spend hard while staying profitable

Opportunity to grow with a brand aiming for serious scale



???? Application Requirements



To be considered, include:



Brands you’ve scaled (with daily spend levels)

Highest daily spend you’ve managed profitably

Your approach to scaling from $2k/day ? $10k+/day

title: Graphic & Packaging Design Specialist
description:
Job Title: Graphic & Packaging Design Specialist



Location: Remote  

Type: Part-Time (Potential to transition to Full-Time)



---



About the Role  

We are looking for a highly skilled, technical, and creative Graphic & Packaging Design Specialist to lead the visual development of our physical brand. This role is specifically for a designer who understands that great packaging is where art meets engineering.



You will be responsible for the end-to-end design process—from the initial creative concept to the technical preparation of dyelines for manufacturing. We need someone who can work independently and efficiently, moving from a blank canvas to a high-fidelity 3D render with speed and precision.



---



Key Responsibilities



- Packaging Design & Production: Design and execute retail-ready packaging, including custom boxes, Mylar bags, tube stickers, and label designs.

- Technical Dyeline Management: Expertly use and edit dyelines and product outlines, ensuring all designs are perfectly aligned for print, including bleeds, safe zones, and technical specs.

- 3D & Image Rendering: Create high-end 3D renderings and GLB files of finished packaging to be used for web visuals and marketing materials.

- Merch Design: Conceptualize and design branded merchandise and apparel.

- Marketing Assets: Design high-impact digital and print assets, including flyers, insert cards, pop-up banners, and programmatic digital ads.

- Brand Consistency: Maintain and evolve the brand’s visual identity across all physical and digital touchpoints.



---



Required Skills & Experience



- Professional Portfolio: A strong, diverse portfolio showcasing real-world packaging projects (boxes, bags, and stickers are a must).

- Technical Expertise: Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator & Photoshop) and specialized tools for 3D product rendering.

- Print Mastery: Deep understanding of the technicalities of print production, material finishes, and structural design.

- Speed & Efficiency: Proven ability to complete tasks quickly while maintaining a high standard of polished, "retail-ready" work.

- Independence: A self-starter who can interpret creative direction with minimal oversight and provide proactive design solutions.

- Communication: Excellent written English and the ability to manage multiple project timelines reliably.



---



Nice to Have



- Experience working with eCommerce or consumer brands (specifically within the hemp or wellness space).

- Familiarity with paid media creative requirements and visual storytelling.

- Understanding of the manufacturing process for different packaging materials.



---



Why Join Us?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in a flexible, results-oriented environment.

- Creative Impact: You will be the primary hands-on designer for our physical product line.

- Startup Growth: Join a fast-moving, collaborative team with long-term growth potential and increasing responsibility.



---



To Apply: Please submit your resume along with a link to your working portfolio. Note: Applications without a portfolio showcasing packaging and 3D rendering work will not be reviewed.
