title: Full-Stack AI Engineer
description:
We are looking for a builder who can design, develop, and deploy production-ready AI agent systems.



This is not a research role. You will be responsible for connecting LLMs to real-world workflows (APIs, CRMs, voice systems, databases) and shipping systems that are reliable, scalable, and cost-efficient.



If your experience is primarily tutorials or prototypes without real users, this role is not a fit.



What You’ll Do

Build end-to-end AI agent systems (frontend ? backend ? LLM ? automation)

Integrate LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) into real workflows

Design and implement RAG pipelines (embeddings + vector databases)

Build and consume RESTful and WebSocket APIs

Deploy and manage systems in AWS, GCP, or Azure

Optimize for latency, cost, and reliability

Implement logging, monitoring, and production debugging

Apply security best practices (rate limiting, validation, API key handling)

Required Skills

Full-stack development (Node.js + Vite.js with React or Vue)

Python backend development (FastAPI or Flask; async preferred)

Experience with LLM APIs (prompting, embeddings, function calling)

Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)

Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis

REST + WebSocket API development

Cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

CI/CD and containerization (Docker; Kubernetes is a plus)

Git version control

Experience debugging production systems

AI Experience (Required)



You must have shipped at least one of the following:



AI agents (multi-step workflows, tool usage)

RAG systems (retrieval + generation)

Function calling / tool-integrated systems

LLM-based automation pipelines

What We Care About (Non-Negotiable)

You have shipped real systems used by real users

You can connect LLMs to APIs, databases, and workflows

You think in terms of automation and outcomes, not just code

You understand cost control, latency, and hallucination mitigation

You can work with incomplete requirements and figure things out

Nice to Have

LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face

Serverless (AWS Lambda, Cloud Functions)

Real-time pipelines / streaming systems

AI API cost optimization strategies

title: Virtual Appointment Setter for US Construction Sales Team (Base + Commission, Part-Time)
description:
You'll be the first voice prospects hear when they call in or answer our outbound campaigns. Your job is simple: qualify interested leads, book qualified appointments for our in-person closer to visit their home or business, and keep detailed notes in our CRM system. You own the phone and the calendar. If you can listen, follow a script, and handle objections calmly, you can make solid money here.



Background:

We work with construction and home service companies across Utah and the Southwest. Our client portfolio includes custom builders, solar installers, HVAC contractors, and landscape design companies. We've built a full sales operation from the ground up, and we're now scaling the team to handle volume. You'll be part of a lean, commission-driven sales machine.



Detailed Responsibilities:



1. Answer inbound calls and outbound call attempts from warm and cold leads. Listen for project intent, timeline, and budget. Qualify prospects using a simple framework and log all notes into our CRM platform immediately after each call.

2. Book qualified appointments for our in-person site visit closer. Confirm appointment details (name, phone, address, project scope), send confirmation texts/emails, and manage the calendar. Track your book rate daily.

3. Follow the lead nurture sequence for prospects who aren't ready yet. Send texts,
s, and voi
s based on the workflow. Document every touchpoint. Aim for callback compliance above 90%.

4. Report daily metrics to the sales manager: calls handled, leads qualified, appointments booked, no-shows. Log time sheets and commission-tracking data via a simple Google form. No guessing on payouts.

5. Identify and escalate hot leads immediately (emergency projects, ready-to-sign prospects). Flag these in Slack and notify the closer within 2 hours.



Required Technical Skills and Experience:



1. Phone Sales or Lead Generation: At least 1 year of experience handling inbound or outbound sales calls, appointment setting, or lead qualification in any industry. You should know how to listen, ask clarifying questions, and handle objections without getting frustrated.

2. CRM Data Entry: Comfortable logging notes and data into a CRM platform (any platform: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.). Fast typing, attention to detail, and the ability to multi-task while on calls.

3. English Fluency: Native or near-native spoken English. You'll be on the phone with US homeowners and business owners. Clear pronunciation, ability to understand accents, and conversational confidence are non-negotiable.



Soft Skills:



1. Self-Starter: You don't need hand-holding. You follow the script, log your notes, and move to the next call. You ask clarifying questions when unsure, but you don't wait for permission to work.

2. Resilience: Not every call books an appointment. You'll hear "no" often. You take it in stride, stay positive, and move to the next prospect.

3. Attention to Detail: Wrong phone numbers, missed appointment slots, or incomplete CRM notes cost the closer money. You treat the data like it's your own commission on the line.

4. Communication: You speak clearly. You follow instructions. You flag issues in Slack instead of hiding problems.



Basic Skills:



1. English: Fluent spoken and written English (US accent or clear international accent). You should take a voice/video recording as part of your application to prove it.

2. Computer Basics: Comfortable with Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Sheets, Google Docs), Slack, and Zoom. You can troubleshoot basic tech issues (restart, clear cache, check internet) without calling support every time.

3. Phone and Internet: Reliable US-based or internationally stable internet (minimum 10 Mbps down, 5 Mbps up). Dedicated phone line or headset (not speaker phone). Quiet, professional work environment.



Desired Technical Skills and Experience:



1. Sales Script Mastery: If you've memorized and delivered a tight sales script 100+ times, you'll ramp faster. You know where to pause, when to use a soft close, and how to recover from an objection.

2. Warm List Outreach: If you've worked with referral databases or warm prospect lists (past customers, referral leads), you understand the higher close rate and can adjust your approach accordingly.

3. No-Show Recovery: If you've managed appointment calendars and handled cancellations professionally, you know how to keep the closer's schedule full.



Work Schedule and Holidays:



Part-Time: 25 hours per week

Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM Mountain Time (11:00 PM to 5:00 AM Manila Time). Some flexibility on start/end times if needed for overlap.

Timezone: Mountain Time (UTC-6 / UTC-7 depending on daylight saving)

Leave: After 6 months of employment, 3 vacation days and 3 sick days per year. Cash equivalent for unused days upon termination.

Holidays: Filipino national holidays except All Saints Day and All Souls Day. US holidays (July 4, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year) are working days for you, but you'll receive holiday pay at 1.25x your base rate if scheduled.



Salary:



Base: $350/month (for 25 hours/week)

Commission: $25 per qualified appointment booked that the closer confirms was legitimate and showed up. If the prospect no-shows due to a missed confirmation from you, no commission for that appointment.

Example: If you book 8 appointments per week (1-2 per day), that's roughly 32-40 appointments per month = $800-$1,000 in commission + $350 base = $1,150-$1,350/month total.



Perks and Benefits:



1. 13th Month Pay: Paid in December (1/12 of your average monthly earnings from the past 11 months).

2. Commission Transparency: You'll see every booked appointment, every completed site visit, and every commission dollar owed in a shared dashboard. No mystery payouts.

3. Flexible Ramp: You start part-time, but if you book 10+ appointments per week consistently, we'll move you to full-time with higher base pay and a path to team lead or closer role.

4. Performance Bonus: Hit 40+ booked appointments in a calendar month, and you get a $100 bonus. Hit 50+, and you get $200.



Training Provided:



1. 2-Day Onboarding: We'll walk you through the CRM, the lead qualification framework, the appointment booking process, and the calendar system. You'll listen to recorded calls from high performers and understand what good sounds like.

2. Weekly Script Training: Every Monday, we'll review this week's calls, identify objections, and practice responses. You'll work with the sales manager to tighten your close rate.

3. Product Knowledge: Deep dive on the services we sell (solar, HVAC, construction, landscape design, etc.). You won't be a technical expert, but you'll understand enough to ask smart questions.

4. Lead Nurture Playbook: You'll get the exact
 and text sequences to send to prospects who say "maybe later." We'll A/B test sequences together to find what works.



Career Potential:



This is a stepping stone role. Our best setters move into one of three directions:



1. Virtual Closer: If you're great on the phone, graduate to handling the closing calls (higher commission, 30-40 hours/week, full-time potential).

2. Sales Manager: If you're consistently hitting targets and mentoring newer tea
mbers, we'll bring you on as a part-time manager to train the next cohort of setters.

3. In-Person Closer: If you want to travel to Utah and close deals face-to-face, we'll invest in your relocation and put you on our in-person team (higher commission, $2,000-$3,000/month potential).



Raises are tied to performance: hit your targets for 2 months, and we discuss a base increase. Consistent top performers (60+ appointments/month) can move to full-time with benefits.



How to Apply:



To apply, please do the following:



1. Put "SETTER RECRUIT" in your
 subject line. Applications without this phrase will not be reviewed.

2. Record a 30-second voice or video introduction in English. Tell us:

- Your name and where you're from

- One sales or customer service win you're proud of

- Why you want this job



Upload this as an MP3 or MP4 file attached to your
. If we can't understand your English clearly, we won't move forward, so make sure this is crystal clear.

3. Answer the following 3 questions in 2-3 sentences each:

- Describe a time you booked an appointment or closed a sale when the prospect said "I need to think about it" first.

- What's your biggest strength in a sales role?

- Why do you want to work in construction or home services sales?

4. Send your application to: 



Applications with the voice recording and written answers will be reviewed immediately. You'll hear back within 3 business days.

title: Creative Strategist (Part-Time, Remote | Contractor)
description:
Company: Socialyte

Location: Remote (Philippines/Mexico preferred)

Type: Part-Time Independent Contractor



Compensation Structure



This is a contractor role with a flat base salary plus per-client earnings that grow as your client load grows.

Base Salary: $138/month (Covers core responsibilities including graphics, carousels, and execution document production)



Month 1 — Strategy Build Fee: $300 per client (Applies to all packages — this is paid for every new client you onboard)

Month 2+ — Monthly Residual Per Active Client:



Standard package ($800): $150/month per client

Execution package ($2,000): $180/month per client

Growth package ($2,500): $200/month per client

Monetization package ($3,500): $250/month per client



The more clients you manage, the more you earn. This structure rewards consistency and quality.



About the Role



We're looking for a Creative Strategist who can turn client business goals into clear, executable content plans — without needing their hand held.

This is a strategy-first, systems-based role at the intersection of research, creative direction, and execution planning. You won't be filming or editing — you'll be designing the system that execution follows. If you love figuring out why content works and building frameworks that make creative teams faster, this role is for you.



What You'll Own



* Client content strategy — translating business goals into content pillars, audience positioning, and repeatable frameworks

* Content planning — monthly content calendars, platform allocation, scripted vs. unscripted breakdown

* Production prep — scripts, talking points, shot lists, and format direction

* Creative Execution Packs — editing instructions, hooks, pacing, structure, music, and branding rules handed off cleanly to production

* Content review & approval — reviewing edited content for strategic alignment, writing clear revision notes

* Folder & drive management — keeping client folders organized and up to date throughout the client lifecycle

* Performance & optimization — monthly analytics reviews, refining hooks and formats based on results

* Trend & research — staying ahead on TikTok, Instagram, and Creative Center; maintaining shared hook and format libraries





What You Will NOT Do



* Film, edit, or post content

* Handle client communication or DMs

* Create ClickUp tasks or manage project admin

* Seek approval for standard strategy decisions





What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



?? MUST be fluent in English — spoken and written. This is a non-negotiable requirement. You will be expected to communicate clearly and professionally in English at all times, including on client kickoff calls.

* Strong understanding of short-form content strategy (TikTok, Instagram Reels)

* Experience analyzing viral content and identifying repeatable hook frameworks

* Ability to write clear, detailed execution documents that creators and editors can follow without follow-up

* Proficient with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) — AI usage is required, not optional

* Excellent async written communication — you'll work primarily through ClickUp

* Highly organized, self-directed, and able to manage multiple clients at once

* Responds within 24 hours during business days





Nice-to-haves:



* Experience with Canva, Vista Social, TikTok Creative Center, or Poppy AI

* Background in social media marketing, content production, or creative direction

* Experience working in a remote async team environment





Performance Expectations



* Deliver new client strategies within 5 business days of intake completion

* Analyze a minimum of 50–100 viral videos per niche per strategy build

* Keep no more than 10% of assigned tasks overdue in any given month

* Use AI tools consistently as part of your weekly workflow

* Maintain clean, organized client folders with no outstanding backlogs





Tools You'll Use



ClickUp · Claude AI · Poppy AI · Vista Social · TikTok Creative Center · Instagram · Canva





You're the Right Fit If:



* You can look at a client's goals and immediately start building a content framework

* Your execution documents are so clear that no one has to ask follow-up questions

* You stay ahead of trends — not because you're told to, but because you can't help it

* You're comfortable working async and communicating everything through docs and Loom

* You actively use AI as a core part of how you research, ideate, and produce strategy





How to Apply



* A short intro about your background in content strategy

* 1–2 examples of strategy work, execution documents, or content frameworks you've built

* The tools and AI platforms you regularly use in your workflow

* Your availability 





We look forward to hearing from you!

description:

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

Our Purpose:

Overview

We are a growing real estate investment company managing a portfolio of residential rental properties. We’re seeking a highly organized, proactive Remote Property Manager & Operations Coordinator to oversee day-to-day property operations, tenant communication, and administrative coordination as we scale.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives on ownership, follow-through, and keeping systems running smoothly. You’ll work closely with ownership and play a key role in managing tenants, vendors, and internal operations.

Operations & Growth Support

title: Design Operations Associate
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Design Operations Associate to support our architectural and design team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys working behind the scenes, and can keep projects, people, and systems running smoothly.



You will play a key role in ensuring the design department operates efficiently by handling administrative tasks, coordinating workflows, managing resources, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines and delivering high-quality work.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Provide efficient virtual office management support, including accurate processing of invoices, maintaining digital records, and assisting with online procurement tasks.

- Assist and coordinate with designers to ensure project tracking data is accurate and up to date.

- Help manage team accounts, assist with logins, and provide guidance on using tools such as Docusign, Dialpad, Lark Payment Requests, and others.

- Support designers with operational tasks such as sending documents via Docusign, submitting payment requests, scheduling meetings, coordinating projects, and working with other departments.

- Coordinate with consultants, request proposals, assist in scheduling site visits, track progress, and ensure timely submission of payments.

- Support the recruiting process for the design department by collating applicants from different platforms and scheduling interviews for shortlisted candidates.

- Ensure proper folder management and that all necessary documents are correctly stored in project folders.

- Assist in client contract processing by coordinating with sales, engineering, and finance teams, helping with contract drafting, payment reminders, and maintaining meeting records.

- Understand construction project processes, including phases, timelines, and deliverables, to help ensure smooth contract and project flow.

- Perform other tasks as needed to support the operations of the design team.



What We’re Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Engineering, or a related field.

- Proven experience in a project coordination, operations, or administrative role, preferably in a design-related environment.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).

- Basic knowledge of Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.

- Strong communication and presentation skills.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail and accuracy.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

- Knowledge of industry-specific standards, if applicable.



Why This Role is a Great Fit

- Long-term, stable remote role with a growing design team

- Work closely with architects, designers, and project managers

- Opportunity to grow within operations and project coordination

- Exposure to real-world architectural and construction workflows



How to Apply

Please submit your application along with your resume and a brief note/portfolio about your experience in operations, or any relevant experience.

title: CPA /Senior Accountant
description:
Are you ready to take your accounting career to the next level? We are a US-based real estate investment and management company seeking a talented and motivated Senior Accountant to join our growing international team. This is a remote, full-time role based in the Philippines, where you’ll work directly with our US leadership during US business hours.

If you’re passionate about real estate accounting, thrive in fast-paced environments, and want to contribute to exciting projects across multiple entities, this is the opportunity for you.



What You’ll Do

As our Senior Accountant, you’ll be a key player in keeping our financial operations accurate, compliant, and efficient. You won’t just be crunching numbers—you’ll be driving clarity and insights that help us grow.

Manage the full accounting cycle, including journal entries, reconciliations, and month/quarter-end close.

Prepare accurate financial statements and management reports.

Handle accounts payable/receivable, tenant ledgers, and vendor payments

Oversee bank reconciliations and investigate discrepancies.

Assist with budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis.

Partner with CPAs during audits and tax filings.

Ensure compliance with US GAAP, Cash, and Modified Cash standards.

Maintain accurate financial data in AppFolio and QuickBooks Online (QBO).

Provide insightful reporting and analysis to the CFO and leadership team.



What We’re Looking For

We want someone who is not only technically strong but also proactive, communicative, and eager to add value.



Required:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

3–5 years of accounting experience with a US-based real estate company.

Strong knowledge of property management and hospitality accounting.

Hands-on experience with AppFolio and QuickBooks Online (QBO).

Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken.

Meticulous attention to detail, organizational strength, and reliability in meeting deadlines.

Flexibility to work US business hours.



Preferred:

CPA license (Philippines or US).

Experience with multi-entity structures and consolidations.

Familiarity with investor reporting and distributions.

Strong Excel skills, especially for financial modeling and analysis.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

Competitive pay with long-term career growth opportunities.

A chance to work directly with US executives and decision-makers.

Exposure to exciting real estate and hospitality projects across the US.

A professional yet supportive team culture where your work is valued.

A stable role in an expanding international company with room to grow.



Here, your skills will make an immediate impact, and your career will grow alongside our company’s success.



If you’re ready to take ownership, make a difference, and build a rewarding career in real estate accounting, we’d love to meet you.



Apply now and become an essential part of our accounting team.

title: Podcast & Video Editor + YouTube Growth Strategist

This is not an entry-level role — you must be highly organized, able to follow detailed workflows, meet deadlines without reminders, and keep us 2–3 episodes ahead at all times.

$8–$11 USD/hour (based on experience)

)

-Highly organized, deadline-driven, and proactive communicator

-Stable internet and backup connectivity plan



BONUS SKILLS

-Experience with Kajabi or other course platforms

-Experience with ActiveCampaign (to schedule podcast
s)

-Graphic design for thumbnails and social media

-Marketing or ad campaign content creation



WHAT WE EXPECT FROM YOU

Reliability: You meet every deadline

Independence: You follow a documented process without constant oversight

Versatility: You can handle podcasts, YouTube growth, and course/social video editing

Commitment: You see yourself in this role for at least 6–12 months



HOW TO APPLY

-Send ALL of the following in one
 or message — incomplete applications will be ignored:

-3+ samples of podcasts you’ve edited (audio + video)

NOTE: Shortlisted applicants will be given a test project to evaluate quality, speed, and ability to follow instructions.

title: Personal Assistant
description:
Hi there!



I’m an entrepreneur with a lot of big ideas and exciting projects. Things are moving very fast for me right now, and I’ve realized I can’t do it all alone. I’m looking for a friendly, super-smart, and fast-moving Action Partner to help me turn my ideas into reality.



The Vibe:

I’m the "Idea Guy." You are the "Make it Happen" person. I’ll send you the vision (usually via a quick voice note or a short message), and you take the ball and run with it.



What you’ll be doing:



Taking Action: If I have a new service idea, you’ll help me set up the basics to get it running (like simple landing pages or lead lists).

Being Resourceful: If you don't know how to do something, you’re the type of person who loves to watch a quick YouTube video or search Google to figure it out.

Staying Organized: Helping me keep track of the "to-do" list so nothing falls through the cracks.

Simple Tech Stuff: Using tools like social media,
, or AI to help our business grow.

This is for you if:



You love working fast and seeing results.

You are a "self-starter" (you don't need me to watch over your shoulder).

You speak and write great English.

You are a positive person who loves to learn new things.

Why join me?

I’m a very fair person to work for and I treat my team like family. I believe that when I win, you should win too! As we grow and make more money, I love to share that success through bonuses and pay raises.



How to Apply:

I want to keep this simple! Send me a short message and tell me:



A little bit about yourself.

One time you "figured something out" on your own without being told how.

Type the word "READY" at the top of your message so I know you read this whole post.

AND PROVIDE DATE OF BIRTH ON TOP NEXT TO THE WORD "READY" TO AVOID AI COPY AND PASTE APPLICANTS . THANK YOU 

I can't wait to meet you and start building something great!

mbers to achieve performance goals.

title: Remote Bookkeeper (Part-Time, EST Hours)
description:
Remote Bookkeeper (Part-Time, EST Hours)



Location: Remote – Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time

Schedule: Monday–Friday | Start between 7:00–9:00 AM EST | 4–5 hours/day

Compensation: $15–$20/hour based on experience | Paid weekly



About the Opportunity

We’re seeking a highly motivated Remote Bookkeeper to join a lean, fast-moving team in the home services industry. This is a permanent, part-time role ideal for a detail-oriented, self-sufficient professional who can work independently while supporting leadership with timely financial reports that drive business decisions.



The ideal candidate thrives in a structured remote environment, values accountability, and has experience managing daily financial workflows with minimal supervision. You’ll be a critical tea
mber ensuring the business runs with clarity, precision, and confidence.



Key Responsibilities

- Record daily transactions and reconcile bank activity using QuickBooks Online

- Compile and send daily financial summary reports (by 9:00 AM EST) to internal leadership

- Manage and update Excel-based job costing reports

- Track and report payments by method (cash, check, financing, etc.)

- Input contract totals from sales closed the previous day

- Organize and enter installer crew activity and purchase orders

- Interface with operations team via Slack and submit End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Maintain a consistent, dependable reporting cadence



Required Skills & Experience

- Minimum 2 years of professional experience in bookkeeping or accounting

- Daily user of QuickBooks Online – able to work without hand-holding

- Fluent in English with strong written communication skills

- Proficient with Microsoft Excel for building, maintaining, and analyzing reports

- Experience working remotely with independent time management

- Dependable internet connection and a quiet, professional home office setup



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience using Salesforce or Lead Perfection CRM platforms

- Familiarity with job costing methods and contractor/vendor purchase tracking

- Prior experience supporting businesses in the home improvement or services sector

- Associates or Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or related field (not required if experienced)



Work Environment & Tools

- Communication: Slack (you will be onboarded to the workspace)

- Daily Reporting: Submit morning summaries and EOD logs via internal systems

- Supervision: Minimal – must be dependable, accountable, and self-driven

- Team Size: 5 total, including owners and a department manager

- Measurement: Your performance will be tracked using clear, agreed-upon KPIs



Candidate Traits We're Looking For

- Detail-Oriented: You spot issues before others do

- Self-Starter: You take initiative without needing to be chased

- Time-Conscious: You meet your deadlines and respect others’ time

- Growth-Minded: You’re willing to learn and evolve with the role

- Team-Friendly: You communicate clearly and play well with others, even remotely



Compensation & Logistics

- Hourly Rate: $15–$20/hour based on experience

- Payment Schedule: Weekly via EOR

- Start Date: Target start by Monday, June 2, 2025

- Role Type: Permanent, Part-Time



How to Apply

Apply with your resume and include brief responses to the screening questions listed BELOW. Strong candidates will be contacted for a screening call and invited to meet the hiring manager and owner during the final stage.



Pre-Screening Questions

1. Do you have at least 2 years of bookkeeping experience, including daily use of QuickBooks Online?

2. Are you available to begin your workday between 7:00–9:00 AM EST, Monday through Friday?

3. Can you create Excel-based financial reports and job costing documents from scratch?

4. Have you worked with Salesforce or Lead Perfection CRM systems before?

5. Do you have a professional home office with dependable internet access?

title: Creative Project Manager
description:
Overview



Phoenix is a full-service Web3 marketing agency driving growth and innovation for protocols, platforms, and communities in the decentralized space. We value creativity, speed, and building systems that scale. We're looking for a Creative Project Manager to own the day-to-day operations of our creative team, run production from kickoff to final QA, and build the processes that let a lean team punch above its weight.



This is a fully remote role. Working hours must overlap with U.S. timezones for real-time collaboration with the team and clients.



The Role



This is the operational backbone of our creative department. You won't just be tracking tasks, you'll be managing a team of designers and coordinators, owning the full lifecycle of 100+ creative requests per month, and building the systems that keep quality high while volume scales.



Reporting directly to Leadership / Co-Founder, you are the bridge between Account Management and the Creative team. You're responsible for making sure the creative vision translates into flawless output — on-brand, on-budget, and ahead of schedule — without burning out the people doing the work.



What Success Looks Like in 90 Days



- You've established a consistent QA process so nothing reaches a client without a review checkpoint.

- The creative team has clear daily priorities and a structured workflow — no one is guessing what to work on next.

- Revision rounds have decreased because briefs are tighter and feedback loops are faster.

- You've built a working rhythm with Account Management so requests flow cleanly into production without bottlenecks.

- The team sees you as their manager, not just a coordinator.



Responsibilities



Team Management & Creative Operations



- Directly manage the internal creative team — designers, coordinators, and junior contributors. This means assigning work, running 1:1s, giving feedback on output quality, unblocking people, and building a culture of accountability and craft.

- Act as the final Quality Assurance (QA) lead. Every deliverable gets reviewed against brand guidelines and technical specs before it reaches a client. You are the last line of defense.

- Own the daily workflow across 100+ monthly creative requests (client and internal). Prioritize, sequence, and keep the board moving so the team always knows what's next.

- Anticipate resource gaps and proactively manage scope expansion and change requests** to protect team bandwidth, timelines, and project profitability.



Process & Systems



- Architect and continuously improve creative workflows — from intake to delivery — so the team can handle growing volume without proportional headcount increases.

- Maintain detailed project roadmaps, milestones, and delivery schedules for multiple concurrent Web3 accounts.

- Evolve our internal tech stack (Notion, Figma, Adobe Creative Cloud) to automate repetitive tasks and improve reporting transparency.

- Manage third-party vendors or freelance contributors when needed, ensuring their work integrates seamlessly with internal standards.



Client Integration & Communication



- Serve as a point of contact for clients during the production phase when needed, translating complex feedback into clear, prioritized creative briefs.

- Navigate client feedback sessions — balancing client desires with creative integrity and production realities.

- Translate high-level client business goals into actionable, tiered project phases for the design and content teams.



 Qualifications



Required:



- 3–5 years of experience in a creative agency environment — specifically running creative operations, managing production workflows, and keeping high-volume output on track. You've done this at scale before.

- Figma proficiency — you can confidently navigate design files, collaborate within shared workspaces, manage structured feedback cycles between designers and stakeholders, and enforce file organization standards.

- People management experience — you've directly managed creative talent (designers, coordinators, or producers), not just managed projects alongside them.

- AI-assisted creative workflows — working familiarity with AI design tools, generative content tools, and automation in the creative process. You don't need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable integrating AI into ideation, production, and iteration cycles. This is a core part of how we work.

- High-volume operational comfort — you thrive managing 100+ requests per month across multiple accounts simultaneously, not 5 big campaigns per quarter.



Preferred:



- Design background or strong design sensibility — you can evaluate creative output with a trained eye, not just check boxes.

- Experience with Adobe Creative Cloud production workflows.

- Familiarity with Google Workspace and Notion for documentation, project tracking, and team collaboration.

- Understanding of the Web3 landscape (DeFi, NFTs, DAOs) and the pace of crypto-native creative cycles. This is preferred but not required. If you're a strong operator with agency experience, we can get you up to speed on Web3.



Soft Skills:



- Exceptional organizational instincts and the ability to maintain composure under the pressure of tight deadlines and shifting priorities.

- Strong negotiation skills — you can push back on unreasonable timelines while keeping relationships intact.

- Clear, direct communication. Our team coordinates primarily through
 — you should be comfortable in fast-moving async channels.



Details



- Location: Fully remote

- Schedule: U.S. timezone overlap required

- Reports to: Leadership / Co-Founder

- Team: You'll manage a creative team of designers and coordinators

title: Administrative Assistant (Tech-Savvy | Excellent Excel Skills | Data-Focused)
description:
Administrative Assistant (Tech-Savvy | Data-Focused)

Remote | Full-Time | U.S. Based Healthcare Operations



We’re looking for a highly motivated Administrative Assistant who is detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and comfortable working with data. This is a great opportunity for someone early in their career who is eager to grow and build strong technical skills in a fast-paced environment. We will be testing Typing and Excel Skills upon screening or first interview.



What You’ll Do

* Support daily operations through a variety of administrative and data-related tasks

* Work extensively in Microsoft Excel to organize, clean, and manage data

* Input and maintain large datasets with speed and accuracy (50–60+ WPM)

* Assist in building and updating reports, trackers, and spreadsheets

* Organize files and maintain structured digital records

* Handle ad hoc tasks, research, and process support as needed



What We’re Looking For

* Highly tech-savvy and quick to learn new tools and systems

* Strong Excel skills (formulas, sorting/filtering, basic data analysis) 

* Fast and accurate typing speed (50+ WPM, 60+ preferred)

* Strong attention to detail and organization

* Reliable, proactive, and able to follow instructions closely



Nice to Have

* Experience working with data or spreadsheets

* Familiarity with Google Sheets or other data tools

* Previous administrative or virtual assistant experience



What to Expect

* Hands-on role working with real data and business processes

* Opportunity to strengthen your technical and analytical skills

* Live technical assessment during the interview process

 and keep our asset library organized.

title: Bill Dispute Tracking
description:
We are DrayEasy Inc, a logistics company specializing in freight brokerage services. We are looking for a self-motivated individual who can perform the tasks with minimal or no supervising. Welcome to join us if you’re a fast learner, a good communicator, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.



Our website: 
/



Position Available:

Bill Dispute Tracking



DESCRIPTION:

1. Tracking initiated bill disputes with US vendors.

2. Follow up on disputes that are overdue, which are pending the US vendors' reply.

3. Initiate a dispute with the trucker based on the Sales Support's provided reasoning.

4. Work with your carrier success supervisor and sales support to resolve escalated disputes.

5. Negotiate and maintain the US vendors' relationship during this process with a collaborative mindset.

6. File EOD Bill Dispute report

7. Learn dispute skills and tactics from your carrier success supervisor, with ample oppertunity for growth.





QUALIFICATIONS:

1. Customer service/dispute experience preferred.

2. Good in English communications.

3. Have good comprehensive skill

4. Must be adaptable and meticulous

5. Must be able to work on night shift (US time)

6. Must have working computer and high-speed internet

7. Able to work 40 hours each week

8. Must have power backup in case of power outage

9. Must have a well-used microphone

title: Paid Ads Team Member (Full Time)
description:
Paid Ads Tea
mber (Full Time)



Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key.



We are hiring a Full-Time Paid Ads Specialist with experience running
, Instagram, Google, and Amazon Ads. This is a long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role. You’ll be a key player in helping us scale ad campaigns for multiple brands across the martial arts and eCommerce industries.



In addition to ads management, we’re looking for someone with graphic design skills to help create ad creatives, landing page assets, and branded visuals.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Paid Ads Management



• Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns across:



• Meta 
 & Instagram)



• Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube)



• Amazon Ads (PPC, Sponsored Brands, Product Listings)



• Monitor KPIs daily and adjust targeting, budget, and creatives based on performance



• A/B test headlines, thumbnails, creative formats, landing pages, and offers



• Create custom audiences, retargeting flows, and conversion-focused funnels



• Provide weekly ad reports and campaign insights



2. Graphic Design & Creative Development



• Design static ads, social graphics, and promotional assets using Canva or Adobe Creative Suite



• Collaborate with our copywriters or marketing team to turn scripts or ideas into visuals



• Ensure all assets match brand guidelines and platform specifications



• Occasionally assist with mockups for new product launches or landing pages



3. Bonus Responsibilities (Optional but Valuable)



• Build landing pages (in GHL, Duda, or similar tools)



• Write ad copy for different platforms



• Help research competitors and gather swipe files for inspiration



Must-Have Experience With:



• Ads Platforms: Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Amazon Seller Central



• Design Tools: Canva, Adobe Photoshop or Illustrator



• Project Tools: ClickUp, Slack, Gmail



• Reporting: Google Sheets or Excel



• Understanding of Sales Funnels, Retargeting, and Audience Segmentation



What We’re Looking For



• Experience running paid ad campaigns for brands or agencies



• Strong graphic design eye — you don’t just place images; you think about performance



• Fluent in KPIs: CTR, ROAS, CPA, AOV, LTV



• Responsive communicator who meets deadlines



• Comfortable taking initiative, proposing new strategies, and evolving with platform changes



This is a full-time role with growth potential. As we scale, you could move into a more senior position — leading the creative strategy or managing a team. If you’re a results-driven thinker who enjoys both the creative and analytical side of ads, this is your chance to grow with a company that moves fast.



To ensure you’ve read this entire listing, please respond with the word “triangle” and include:



Your portfolio or examples of past ad campaigns and creatives



A list of platforms and tools you’ve used



Any certifications (Meta, Google, etc. are a plus)

title: AI and Computer Programer (Full Time)
description:
AI & Computer Programer (Full Time)



Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key.



I’m looking for a proactive, AI-literate operator to help us stay ahead of the curve by leveraging AI tools to create content, automate tasks, and improve business efficiency. This is a full-time role with serious growth potential. You must be someone who constantly experiments with new tools and loves turning innovation into systems.



Our agency specializes in marketing and business support for martial arts schools, eCommerce brands, and service providers — and we are increasingly building AI into our workflows. You’ll work closely with me to implement AI across content, automation, lead nurturing, and backend operations.



Key Responsibilities



• AI-Powered Video Creation



• Use tools like Veo 3, Runway, Pika, or Sora to create short-form AI videos for ads, social content, and storytelling



• Assist in turning briefs or written concepts into visual content using AI tools



• Add text, captions, voiceovers, and music to finalize AI video assets



• Manage content delivery across multiple platforms: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.



Business Optimization Through AI



• Identify ways to streamline internal operations using AI (e.g., lead routing, onboarding, reporting)



• Set up workflows using tools like Zapier, Make (Integromat), or GoHighLevel automations



• Help automate tasks like
 responses, meeting scheduling, proposal generation, client reporting, etc.



• Research and test new AI tools as they’re released — bring us the best of what’s new



• Document repeatable processes and systems as we scale



AI Content & Communications



• Use ChatGPT or other LLMs to help write
s, blog drafts, sales scripts, and FAQs



• Generate creative briefs, outlines, or newsletters using AI



• Help brainstorm and test new content strategies across channels



Must-Have Experience With Some of These Tools:



• AI Content & Automation Tools:



• Veo 3, Runway, Pika, Kaiber, Sora



• ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, Copy.ai



• Zapier, Make (Integromat), GoHighLevel workflows



• Google Sheets + AI formulas/macros



• Notion AI, Airtable AI (bonus)



Marketing + Design Stack:



• Canva, CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro (bonus)



• Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, YouTube Studio



• Slack, ClickUp, Gmail



• Shopify or Amazon (bonus if you understand eCommerce workflows)



What We’re Looking For:



• A genuine passion for AI and emerging tech — you keep up with releases



• Someone who thinks in systems and is always looking for what can be automated



• Excellent communication skills — you can simplify complexity and write clearly



• Strong attention to detail and the ability to turn ideas into structured workflows



• Self-sufficient and proactive: you don’t wait to be told what to fix — you spot it and do it



This role is full-time. If you’re good, you’ll grow with us. You’ll be helping lead the AI side of the company — not just following checklists.



To ensure you’ve read this entire listing, please reply with the word “triangle” and share a list of the AI tools you are most comfortable with. If you’re really about this life, also tell me one brand or business you think is doing something innovative with AI right now.

title: Meta Paid Ads Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Meta Paid Ads Buyer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there? 

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job? 

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now? 

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?

title: Sales and Operation assistant (remote)
description:
Job Overview: We are a growing custom printed packaging company based in Vancouver, BC Canada, seeking a remote Sales & Operations Assistant with mandatory prior experience in the printing and packaging industry (Do not apply if you have zero experience in this industry). This is a critical requirement and applicants without this background will not be considered. The ideal candidate will have proven executive assistant experience and a solid background in procurement, with the ability to support the CEO and sales team by coordinating projects, managing vendor communications, handling sourcing and order follow-ups, and ensuring smooth operations in our business serving clients in the food and beverage industry, CPG brands, retail product businesses, and medical sectors.



Your role in the organization will include the following:



Organizational Support:

Provide high-level administrative support to the executive, including managing schedules, coordinating departments,  and handling correspondence.

Organize internal systems, files and documents for optimal information flow, ensuring accuracy and efficient business productivity.

Manage business
s, phone calls, and other communications, filtering and prioritizing messages as needed. Ensuring urgent messages are flagged for immediate attention and drafting responses to routine inquiries.

Help resolve issues and challenges by identifying solutions and taking appropriate action.

Taking initiatives to improve SOP to ensure efficient business functionality and productivity.



Interdepartmental support:

Perform data entry and maintain an effective electronic filing system.

Coordinating team functions by interpreting messages.

Collaborate effectively with various departments or teams through virtual meetings and communication tools.

Maintain organized records of documentation and reporting daily/weekly/monthly.

Draft and send quotes promptly and accurately to support sales functions.

Assist with miscellaneous and complex priorities.



Vendor support and coordination:

Act as a liaison, to facilitate efficient communication with vendors, answering inquiries and assisting with needs, demonstrating exceptional judgment in problem-solving.

Coordinate functions like production, shipping and logistics.

Review and approve purchase orders and procurement requests.

Evaluate and select suppliers and manage vendor relationships virtually.

Collaborate with suppliers to resolve issues and optimize partnerships.

Maintain relationships with external vendors to ensure smooth communication.





Qualifications:

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills that allow you to articulate vital information to different audiences

- Excellent interpersonal skills that enables you to develop strong relationships with others

- Fluent in English with a professional communication style.

- Clear, professional phone presence.

- Ability to listen, interpret messages, and execute tasks effectively.

- Strong organizational abilities and meticulous attention to detail.

- Solutions-oriented, accountable, and self-motivated.

- Professional with business maturity and a positive attitude.

- Proficiency in Excel functions, Google Workspace and Microsoft Office Suite.

- Familiarity with ERP type system - Zoho Books / Analytics / BIGIN

- Familiarity with the sales cycle and an understanding of sales strategies and techniques.

- Minimum of 5 years full-time experience as an Executive Assistant. Proven experience in Procurement or in a similar role,

- Must have proven experience in the custom printed packaging industry, including solid knowledge of the printed packaging and practical use of various packaging types.

- Technical knowledge related to procurement, printing materials and production processes, is highly desirable.





Hours and Compensation:

- Working hours:  11 AM to 11 PM (include 1-hour unpaid break to be determined mutually), Monday through Friday (PST TIME, Vancouver BC, Canada). Excluding certain BC / PH statutory Holidays. Salary is paid biweekly via WISE. 

- Training will be provided in only specific areas depending on what the candidate is not familiar with. 

- After completing one year of service with us, tea
mbers become entitled to compensation for National holidays at their current hourly rate.



Application Process:

Applicants are required to include a cover letter, resume, and any relevant work samples and references.

Submissions lacking a cover letter or resume will not be considered.

In your cover letter, please elaborate on your relevant experiences within this industry and express your motivations for joining our team.

*Note: We appreciate all applications, but only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

title: Procurement and Sales Support Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated, organized, and detail-oriented individual to join our team as a Procurement and Sales Assistant. In this role, you will support both our procurement and sales functions by helping manage supplier communication, quotations, order coordination, lead follow-up, and day-to-day administrative support for the management team.



This position is ideal for someone who is proactive, resourceful, and confident communicating with both suppliers and potential customers. You must be able to work effectively in a remote environment, stay highly organized, and contribute to both cost-efficient procurement and sales growth.



Your primary responsibilities will include handling supplier quotations, coordinating shipping and production updates, supporting sales outreach, following up with leads, assisting with customer quotations, and ensuring smooth communication with our management team.



Key Responsibilities

Procurement Responsibilities



Procurement Strategy



Assist in implementing procurement strategies aligned with company goals, including sourcing, cost-saving initiatives, and supplier evaluation.

Research, evaluate, and communicate with suppliers to identify the best options based on price, quality, and lead time.

Support management in comparing vendor quotations and making purchasing decisions.



Purchase Management



Assist in the procurement of goods and services, ensuring timely and cost-effective purchases.

Prepare, review, and organize purchase orders, supplier quotations, and procurement requests.

Monitor order progress and follow up with suppliers on production timelines and delivery schedules.



Cost Control



Monitor procurement expenses and identify opportunities for cost savings.

Help ensure competitive pricing without compromising quality or service.

Maintain accurate costing records for management review.



Supplier Management



Communicate regularly with vendors regarding quotations, production, timelines, shipping, and issue resolution.

Build and maintain professional supplier relationships.

Coordinate supplier communication related to production, shipping, and logistics.



Quality Assurance



Help ensure purchased items meet required quality standards.

Coordinate with suppliers to resolve quality-related concerns, damages, delays, or discrepancies.

Escalate issues promptly to management when needed.



Documentation and Reporting



Create work dockets and maintain organized procurement records.

Track invoices, purchase details, shipping updates, and supplier communications.

Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly executive summary reports.

Sales Assistant Responsibilities



Sales Support



Assist the sales team with preparing quotations, proposals, and customer follow-up communications.

Support inbound and outbound sales activity by helping move leads through the pipeline efficiently.

Coordinate with management to ensure sales opportunities are followed up on in a timely manner.

Help prepare information, pricing, and product details for customer inquiries.



Lead Generation and Prospecting



Research target markets, industries, and potential customers to identify qualified leads.

Build and maintain organized lead lists for outreach campaigns.

Support prospecting efforts through
 outreach, cold calling, and follow-up activity.



Outbound Outreach



Initiate contact with potential clients through calls and
s to introduce our products and services.

Tailor outreach messages based on industry, packaging type, and customer needs.

Represent the company professionally and communicate our value clearly.



Customer Communication



Respond to inquiries from prospective customers promptly and professionally.

Listen carefully to customer requirements and communicate relevant information to the sales or management team.

Follow up with leads and customers to maintain 
ntum and improve conversion opportunities.



Quote and Order Coordination



Assist with preparing and sending customer quotations based on management direction.

Follow up on quotations and help track open opportunities.

Coordinate internally between sales, procurement, and management to support smooth execution after orders are confirmed.



CRM and Pipeline Management



Keep lead, customer, quotation, and follow-up records organized and up to date.

Track sales activities, quote status, and customer interactions accurately.

Help management maintain visibility over the sales pipeline and pending opportunities.

Remote Collaboration

Collaborate effectively with management and tea
mbers through virtual meetings and communication tools.

Support cross-functional coordination between procurement, sales, shipping, and operations.

Listen carefully, interpret instructions accurately, and execute tasks efficiently.

Qualifications

Strong understanding of sourcing, quotations, and vendor communication for consumable products.

Strong knowledge of packaging products, especially flexible packaging and food and beverage packaging, is preferred.

Experience in procurement, sales support, lead generation, customer service, or administrative support.

Experience with cold calling,
 outreach, lead follow-up, or quotation support is a strong asset.

Executive assistant experience is an asset.

Proficiency in Excel, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Office.

Strong written and verbal English communication skills.

Strong organizational skills with a high level of attention to detail.

Self-motivated, dependable, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

Able to manage multiple priorities and follow through consistently.

Working Hours



Working hours are Monday through Friday, 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM PST, excluding National holidays, with an unpaid one-hour break.



National holidays will be determined collaboratively between tea
mbers and the employer. Training will be provided.



Compensation and Benefits

Payment is made twice a month via WISE.

After completing one year of service, tea
mbers become entitled to compensation for National holidays at their current hourly rate.

Tea
mbers are also eligible for a performance-based year-end bonus.

Application Instructions



Applicants are kindly requested to submit both a cover letter and resume with their application. Applications missing either document will not be considered.



In your cover letter, please explain:



Your relevant experience in procurement, sales support, lead generation, or packaging

Your experience working remotely

Why you are interested in joining our team



We appreciate all applicants; however, only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

title: FULL-TIME Graphic Designer (Professional Level Only)

title: GoHighLevel Expert (Full Time)
description:
GoHighLevel Expert (Full Time)



Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key.



We are hiring a Full-Time GoHighLevel Expert with proven experience building, managing, and automating marketing systems inside GoHighLevel (GHL). This is a long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role. You’ll be a key player in helping us scale automation, CRM systems, pipelines, and campaign workflows for multiple brands across the martial arts and broader business sectors.



In addition to technical GHL mastery, we’re looking for someone who understands funnel strategy, automation logic, and can confidently bridge marketing and operations inside a single platform.



Key Responsibilities:

1. GoHighLevel Management & Automation



• Build, optimize, and maintain GoHighLevel accounts and sub-accounts

• Create automations, workflows, and pipelines for lead management and sales tracking

• Set up triggers, tags, and conditional logic for streamlined CRM and marketing processes

• Design and launch
/SMS drip campaigns, appointment reminders, and follow-up sequences

• Manage integrations with tools such as Zapier, Slack, Google Sheets, and Meta Lead Forms

• Create and manage dashboards, reports, and analytics inside GHL



2. Funnel & Campaign Development



• Build conversion-focused funnels using GHL’s funnel builder

• Connect forms, calendars, and automations to ensure smooth user flow

• Implement tracking, conversion pixels, and custom UTM parameters

• Collaborate with our marketing team to align offers, landing pages, and ad campaigns

• Conduct A/B testing to optimize page design, copy, and user experience



3. Bonus Skills (Optional but Valuable)



• Knowledge of paid ads (Meta, Google, or YouTube) and how to integrate tracking into GHL

• Basic graphic design skills for funnel visuals (Canva, Photoshop, or Figma)

• Copywriting or
 marketing experience

• Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, or Make (Integromat) for advanced automation



Must-Have Experience With:



• GoHighLevel (CRM, Automations, Pipelines, Funnels, Forms, Calendars, and Reporting)

• Automation Tools: Zapier, Make, or n8n

•
 & SMS Marketing: Campaign setup, deliverability, and compliance

• Analytics & Reporting: Google Sheets, GHL Dashboards, or Looker Studio

• Project Management: ClickUp, Slack, Gmail



What We’re Looking For:



• Proven experience managing GoHighLevel accounts for agencies or businesses

• Deep understanding of CRM organization, automations, and lead workflows

• Strong grasp of marketing strategy and client lifecycle (from lead to retention)

• Analytical thinker who understands how data flows between tools

• Responsive communicator who meets deadlines and solves problems proactively

• Comfortable taking initiative and evolving with platform updates



This is a full-time role with long-term growth potential. As we scale, you could move into a senior position — overseeing automation strategy or leading system development for client accounts. If you’re a tech-savvy, detail-oriented problem solver who enjoys creating smooth, automated systems that drive real results, this is your opportunity to grow with a company that moves fast.



To confirm you’ve read this entire listing, please respond with the word “triangle” and include:

• Examples of GoHighLevel automations, pipelines, or funnels you’ve built

• A list of platforms and tools you’ve integrated with GHL

• Any relevant certifications or experience (Zapier, Meta, Google, etc. are a plus)

title: Inside Phone Sales
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a motivated and personable individual to join our team as a Follow-Up and Inside Sales Rep. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys connecting with people, educating them about services, and closing deals over the phone. If you have strong communication skills, a sales-oriented mindset, and are looking for a long-term opportunity, we’d love to hear from you!



Job Responsibilities:



-Make follow-up calls to leads and current clients, closing deals effectively.

-Answer incoming calls, guide leads through a provided script, and educate them about our services.

-Ask for the sale confidently while maintaining professionalism.

-Maintain accurate and organized records of client interactions and sales.



Work Schedule:



Work Days: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday.

Days Off: Saturday and Sunday.

Hours: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST. (Manilla PST 9:00pm - 5:00am)



Compensation and Benefits:



Hourly Rate: $6 USD per hour.

Commission: $5-10 USD for every service you successfully sell or close over the phone (new leads or existing clients).



Paid Time Off:



-9 days off throughout the year (5 are paid).

-1 week of paid vacation.

-Unpaid Time Off: 1 week unpaid between Christmas and New Year’s Day.



Requirements:



Strong English communication skills (spoken and written).

Experience in sales and/or customer service is highly preferred.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment.

Ability to follow a script while maintaining a conversational and engaging tone.

Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and results-driven.





To qualify for an interview:



"Hi, I'm Rob, let me introduce myself. Watch this video to learn how to apply"







**Create a recording on Loom (video optional) introducing yourself and reading the provided script below.

Submit your recording along with your application.



Representative: "Hambleton Lawn and Landscape. This is (Name) speaking, how can I help you?"

Lead: "Hi, I’m calling to get a quote for lawn mowing."

Representative: "Perfect, I can certainly help with that! We have a convenient way to generate a quick quote. Would you like to get started?"

Lead: "Yes."

Representative:

"Great! Can I start by getting your name, please?

And your address?

And your zip code?"

Representative:

"Thank you! I’m just going to pull up your address and get some measurements…

Okay, I have it. Here’s what’s included in our service:

Mowing of the entire lawn

Weed whipping and trimming around all obstacles and along the edges of your home

Blowing all debris off hard surfaces

Now, this service is normally $78 per visit. However, I see you're close to some of our other clients, so I can offer you proximity pricing and bring that down to $54 per service. Does that sound good?"

Lead: "That sounds great. How does the billing work?"

Representative:

"We’ve set up a billing system to make things as easy as possible for you—completely pain-free and thought-free. Would you like me to add you to our schedule?"

Lead: "I need to talk to my spouse."

Representative:

"Totally understand! Here’s what I’ll do: to lock in the price and secure your place, I can add you to our schedule and collect your payment information now. If, after speaking with your spouse, she d
 it’s not the right fit, you can call us to cancel. We don’t have any contracts, so you’re not tied to anything."

Lead: "When would the service start?"

Representative:

"Our next service day for your area is Thursday, so just let us know before then if you choose not to proceed. Otherwise, consider it done."

Representative:

"Thank you! By the way, may I ask how you heard about us?"

title: Social Media Assistant (Content + Video + Community Operator)
description:
Flexible hours (async-friendly, non-US hours OK).  Option of part time or full time. 



We’re a growing children’s toy brand building social content that blends founder storytelling and character-driven storytelling.

We’re looking for someone who can create and edit content, engage the community, and help keep things running behind the scenes.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Create & edit short-form video and carousel (Reels/TikTok) 

Strong hooks, clean pacing, text overlays

Help write & shape social captions (including founder content)

Post on Instagram, monitor basic metrics, flag what’s working



MUST HAVES

Strong short-form video editing skills (important)

Comfortable sourcing or creating content

Social media native—you understand what performs

Clear, natural writer

Good instincts for engaging content

Organized and reliable

Basic understanding of AI content generation (ie, Gemini) + analytics

Ideally, you also have experience with kids / parenting content + Open to marketing and admin support over time



TO APPLY:

1. REQUIRED:  Please take the time to provide this customized response; missing this will disqualify your application. 



Share 2–3 content pieces you’ve edited (Reels/TikTok preferred), and for each:

-What exactly did you do? (cuts, pacing, hook, captions, etc.)

-What was the goal of the content? 

-Anything you'd change? 



2. REQUIRED: In the subject line, please write your favorite children’s or parenting social media account.



3. BONUS / OPTIONAL: 

Show how you would turn below prompt into a 15–30 second video (Reels/TikTok).  The goal of this is to understand how you think about content...not how polished your output is.



You can either:

Write it out (structure + editing approach), OR

Submit a rough video (not required, not polished)



Prompt: 

A kid refuses to wear shoes and insists socks are enough.

The parent explains why shoes matter.

The kid keeps negotiating with funny “solutions.”

In the end, the kid still doesn’t wear shoes.



Include

Opening hook (first 1–2 seconds)

What happens next (start ? middle ? end)

On-screen text or captions

How you’d approach pacing or cuts



We are looking forward to moving quickly with candidates who meet the skill requirements!

title: AI Generalist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



I’m looking for people who are tired of rigid corporate structures, endless rules, and limited growth.



This is not a typical “assistant” role.



I’m building a more human, modern alternative to agencies like Athena, with better pay, more ownership, and real opportunities to grow.



We already have a pipeline of clients. Now I’m looking for the right people to grow with.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You’ll work directly with business owners, CEOs and their direct reports to:

- Support day to day operations

- Work with AI tools, agents, and automations

- Bridge the gap between humans and AI systems

- Help businesses move from manual work to automated processes

- Continuously improve workflows and efficiency



This is a generalist role - no two days look the same.



WHO THIS IS FOR

- You’re hungry for growth

- You want more than just tasks — you want responsibility

- You’re comfortable with change, ambiguity, and learning fast

- You have experience in: customer support, executive assistance, operations or similar generalist roles

- You're comfortable working in the US time zones (PST/EST)



MOST IMPORTANTLY: You’re excited about AI and the future of work



WHAT YOU WILL GET

- Better pay than typical VA roles

- Performance-based bonuses (KPIs)

- Yearly salary reviews

- Direct training and mentorship

- Real exposure to how businesses operate

- A path to grow into higher level roles



WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT



This is not a task based job.



You won’t be:

- stuck doing repetitive work

- managed by layers of bureaucracy



Instead:



You’ll be part of a small, fast moving setup where your work actually matters.



FINAL NOTE



If you’re looking for something stable and predictable, this is probably not for you.

title: Affirmation Script Writer (Part-Time) (female)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a creative and emotionally intuitive scriptwriter to write calming, high-quality affirmation scripts in English for a new audio channel.



The content is designed to help listeners relax, feel grounded, and improve their mindset throughout the day.



Responsibilities



Write 5 affirmation scripts per week

Each script should be 15–30 minutes in spoken length

Maintain a calm, slow, repetitive, and soothing tone

Structure scripts so they can be looped seamlessly

Research and adapt high-performing affirmation topics

Match the tone and style of leading affirmation creators (references will be provided)



Ideal Candidate



Strong English writing skills (native or near-native)

Experience with affirmation writing, meditation, mindfulness, or similar content

Ability to write in a gentle, flowing, emotionally supportive style

Good sense of pacing and tone

Bonus: background in psychology, coaching, or self-development



Workload and Pay



Approximately 5 hours per week

$2.45 per hour

Long-term position



To Apply

Please include:



A short introduction

A sample affirmation script (1–2 minutes) written by you

Topic: “Calm and Letting Go”

Note: Clearly copy and pasted AI texts will not be considered



Important

This is not blog writing or SEO writing. We are looking for someone who can write calming, emotionally engaging audio scripts.

Responsibilities



Clean raw voice recordings (remove noise, breaths, and distractions naturally)

Smooth pauses and improve pacing

Apply soft, calming reverb and spatial effects

Mix and balance background music (provided)

Create a consistent and relaxing sound experience

Prepare final audio files optimized for long-form looping (2–3 hours)



Ideal Candidate



Experience with voice editing, podcast editing, or meditation audio

Skilled in tools such as Adobe Audition, Audacity, Logic Pro, or similar

Strong understanding of noise reduction, EQ, compression, and reverb

High attention to detail (no harsh cuts or distracting artifacts)

Bonus: experience with ASMR or meditation audio



Workload and Pay



Approximately 5 hours per week

$2.45 per hour

Long-term position



To Apply

Please include:



A short introduction

Links to previous audio work (required)

Optional: before/after audio samples



Important

This is not basic audio trimming. We are looking for someone who can create a high-quality, calming listening experience.

title: Architectural Rendering Assistant – Color Renderings for Metal Building Drawings
description:
About Us



We are a U.S.-based pre-engineered metal building company creating custom building quotes for customers across the country. We need a reliable rendering assistant who can turn our wireframe building drawings into clean, realistic colored concept renderings for customer presentations.



These are not full architectural designs — they are customer-facing visual mockups based on wireframe drawing.



Job Description



We are looking for a detail-oriented freelancer who can create color renderings from black-and-white wireframe building drawings.



You will receive:



Wireframe PDF drawing

Color specifications (roof, wall, trim colors)



You will create:



Realistic colored exterior renderings of metal buildings Exterior only and only one view.

Accurate renderings matching the actual building geometry



Typical Projects Include:

Pre-engineered metal buildings

Warehouses

Garages

Shops

Barn-style buildings

Multi-building connected structures

Buildings with porches, canopies, lean-tos

Required Skills:



? Experience with architectural rendering software

? Ability to accurately follow wireframe building geometry

? Experience with one or more:



SketchUp

Lumion

Twinmotion

Revit rendering tools

AI rendering software (Rendair, mnml.ai, Veras, etc.)

These do not have to be exact, this is only for conceptual presentation



Important:



This role requires accuracy.

We are NOT looking for artistic reinterpretations.

We need renderings that match the actual building drawings as closely as possible.



Deliverables:



For each project:



One high-quality exterior colored rendering (JPG or PNG)



Fast turnaround preferred (24–Hours / 

Workload:

Part-time freelance

Project-based

Ongoing steady work possible



Please include:

Per-render price

Estimated turnaround time per rendering

To Apply:



Please send:



Portfolio samples of architectural/building renderings

Software you use

Your experience with metal building or architectural rendering

Answer this question:



How would you turn a black-and-white wireframe metal building drawing into an accurate customer-ready color rendering?



Test Assignment:



Qualified applicants will be asked to complete one paid test rendering from a sample building drawing.



Ideal Candidate:



Someone who is:



Reliable

Communicates clearly

Meets deadlines

Can become a long-term rendering partner

Turn around needs to be quick.  We will send this with our Bid or quote that goes out to the customer
