title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant — Etsy & Shopify Shop (Home Décor & Meaningful Gifts)
description:
About the shop



We are a growing Etsy shop — expanding to Shopify — specializing in print-on-demand home décor, baby blankets, throws, table runners, travel accessories, and wrapping paper. Our brand is rooted in timeless Southern coastal elegance: refined, heirloom-inspired, and deeply meaningful. Everything we create is designed to be cherished, gifted, and treasured. We work with POD suppliers including Printify, Casestry, and Pic The Gift, and create all graphics in Adobe Creative Suite.



About this role



We are looking for a warm, detail-oriented virtual assistant whose primary focus will be managing and growing our social media presence on Pinterest, Instagram, and
 — including designing Pinterest pins that convert. You will also support customer service, order tracking, and the early stages of building our
 list.



This is a growth role, not just a support role. We measure success not only by tasks completed, but by the impact on our shop's visibility, traffic, and sales. The right person will take genuine ownership of our social presence, treat Pinterest as a traffic engine, and care deeply about whether their work is actually moving the needle. We will review key metrics together each week and celebrate growth as a team. 

This is a long-term role with real opportunity to grow as the business does. You will be a trusted representative of a brand that takes great care in quality, consistency, and gracious customer communication.



Primary responsibilities



•Design Pinterest pins that are on-brand and optimized for engagement and click-through — vertical format, lifestyle-styled, with elegant text overlays

•Post and schedule content daily across Pinterest, Instagram, and
 using 
-approved captions and imagery

•Engage thoughtfully with followers and comments in a warm, on-brand tone

•Monitor Pinterest analytics and Instagram insights; provide a simple weekly summary with observations on what is performing and what to adjust 

•Assist with growing and maintaining an
 list (platform TBD — experience with Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or Flodesk a plus)



Supporting responsibilities



•Monitor and respond to Etsy customer messages using provided templates and brand voice guidelines

•Track orders daily across Printify, Caseistry, and Pic The Gift; flag issues before production

•Maintain a simple order tracking log in Google Sheets

•Flag any customer complaints or production issues to the shop owner immediately



What we are looking for



•Strong written English — warm, clear, and polished in every message

•Proven experience designing Pinterest pins for a product-based or lifestyle brand — please include examples or a portfolio link in your application

•Understands what makes a Pinterest pin convert: lifestyle staging, emotional headline copy, clean vertical layouts, and warm color palettes — not just pretty graphics

•Proven experience managing Instagram, Pinterest, and
 for a product-based business

•Understands that social media for a product-based business is ultimately about driving traffic and sales — not just posting consistently. Can speak to results they have driven, not just tasks they have completed

•Comfortable being measured on growth metrics — Pinterest outbound clicks, Etsy shop visits, and orders — and willing to adjust strategy based on what the numbers show

•Comfortable working with Adobe Creative Suite files and designing within an established brand system

•Experience with Etsy, Shopify, or print-on-demand platforms preferred

•Reliable, self-directed, and genuinely detail-oriented

•Able to follow detailed SOPs and brand guidelines with care and consistency

•Familiarity with
 marketing platforms (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or Flodesk) is a welcome plus



How we measure success



We will track the following metrics together from week one:



Pinterest outbound clicks — week over week

Etsy shop visits — week over week

Orders placed — compared to baseline before this role began

 list growth — monthly

Instagram follower growth — monthly

At 30, 60, and 90 days we will review these numbers together. Growth does not have to be dramatic — it needs to be consistent and directionally right. We are building something lasting, and we want someone who wants to build it with us.



Tools you will use



Adobe Express (pin design), Pinterest Analytics, Instagram Insights, Pinterest, Instagram,
, Google Sheets, Google Drive,  Etsy Seller Dashboard



What you will receive



•Detailed SOPs, a Pinterest design brief, and brand voice training documents provided from day one

•Clear brand assets, color palettes, and font guidelines — no guesswork on the look and feel

•Consistent part-time hours with a stable, long-term opportunity

•A collaborative, kind, and supportive working relationship built on transparency and mutual respect

•Weekly metric reviews so you always know how your work is performing and where to focus

•Opportunity to grow your hours and responsibilities as the business grows — this role is designed to expand





**To apply, please send a short message that includes: (1) your experience managing social media for a product-based or e-commerce business; (2) examples of Pinterest pins you have designed — links, a portfolio, or screenshots are all welcome; (3) a sample caption written in a refined, warm, heirloom-inspired tone for a baby blanket or table runner — this carries significant weight in our decision; (4) one example of a result you drove for a previous client — traffic growth, follower increase, or sales impact; and (5) your available hours per week and time zone. Applications without both a writing sample and design examples will not be considered.

title: Client-Facing Senior Accountant - Work From Home
description:
You're not just looking for a job—you're looking to make a real difference. You've been in roles that challenge your skills, but something's missing: impact. What if there was a career where you could excel professionally while making a meaningful contribution to the world?



Join our mission-driven team at The Cashflow Doctor, where your accounting expertise directly supports fast-growth founders AND helps orphanages in Mexico thrive.



The Role

As our Senior Accountant, you'll be the strategic accounting partner for small businesses, agencies, and tech startups in a fast-paced, fully remote environment. This is a leadership role where you'll oversee client work, mentor tea
mbers, and ensure exceptional deliverables—all from the comfort of your home office.



Job Requirements:

- CPA with 5+ years of experience in QuickBooks Online (MUST be CPA)

- Natural leader with proven ability to oversee and guide others

- Exceptional at leading client meetings via Zoom with confidence and a Western native tone

- Available to work US Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours

- Strong track record collaborating with US-based clients

- Advanced Excel and accounting software skills

- Detail-oriented, accurate, and timely



Responsibilities:

- Client-Facing Accounting

- Deliver clean, accurate, timely bookkeeping (GAAP or cash basis)

- Lead Zoo
etings with clients, presenting financials and strategic recommendations

- Oversee and review peers' work to ensure quality standards

- Communicate with clients via Slack,
, and Zoom about financials, A/R, A/P, payroll, billings

- Create impactful spreadsheets for forecasts, budgets, and expansion planning

- Leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to streamline processes

- Identify improvements and efficiencies—think strategically, not just transactionally

- Take ownership of client relationships and team deliverables

- Provide high-level reporting to management



Your First 90 Days:

30 Days: Master our systems (
, Slack, Ignition, QuickBooks), complete training videos, handle client reconciliations on time, and build relationships across Accounting and Tax teams.



60 Days: Analyze client accounts to identify gaps and optimization opportunities, work independently with confidence, begin leading client presentations and reviewing peers' work, and select an orphanage or child-related cause to champion.



Who You Are:

You're detail-oriented yet strategic, friendly yet firm. You're a natural leader who inspires accountability. You thrive on solving problems, building clarity through data, and presenting complex information clearly on video calls. You love learning new systems and improving processes. You're a CPA with 5+ solid years of client-facing experience in fast-paced remote environments, and you're excited to collaborate with a global team during California business hours.



Why You'll Love Working With Us:

- Work From Home: Fully remote position—work from anywhere with reliable internet

- USA PST Hours: Collaborate with US clients during California business hours

- Low-Stress Culture: Healthy workloads and realistic expectations

- Flexible Fridays: Set your own 8-hour schedule every Friday

- 15 Days PTO Annually: Plus your birthday as a paid holiday

- End-of-Year Bonuses: Your hard work is rewarded

- Celebrations: Work anniversaries honored with personalized gifts

- Supportive Team: A culture that celebrates wins and fosters growth

- Mission-Driven: Support orphanages and build homes in Mexico

- Professional Development: Training, mentorship, and leadership opportunities



About Us

The Cashflow Doctor helps fast-growth founders scale through smart accounting and tax strategies, leveraging technology to save time and money. Giving back is core to who we are—our founder serves on the board of a nonprofit orphanage and a homebuilding organization in Mexico.



Ready to Apply?

We hire based on accomplishments and cultural fit. Submit your application and thoughtfully answer our assessment questions:



Please fill out the application form:

s in ActiveCampaign

title: Video Editor
description:
About Inumin Media

Inumin Media is a boutique digital marketing agency based in Canada. We specialize in high-impact social media, web design, and paid advertising, helping purpose-driven brands tell their stories through cinematic, engaging content.



We are looking for a creative, detail-oriented Video Editor & Content Creator to help us elevate our production. If you have a sharp eye for pacing, visual trends, and narrative storytelling, you’ll fit right in.



The Essentials

Location: Remote



Working Hours: Monday – Friday | 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM (Mountain Time). This window is non-negotiable for team synchronization.



Compensation: Starting at $5.00 USD/hour (Project-based).



Key Responsibilities

Visual Design: Craft high-converting graphics and carousels using Canva.



Video Production: Edit high-energy short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts) using Adobe Premiere Pro or similar professional software.



Post-Production: Masterfully integrate captions, trending music, SFX, and clean animations.



Collaboration: Work closely with our creative team and occasionally coordinate with clients to secure assets or finalize revisions.



Technical & Professional Requirements

Software: Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or equivalent professional editing suites.



Hardware: A workstation capable of processing 4K video files without lag.



Connectivity: Reliable, high-speed internet (50 Mbps minimum).



AI Savvy: Comfortable leveraging AI tools (ChatGPT, Descript, etc.) to streamline ideation and workflow.



Experience: Minimum 1 year of video editing experience.



Communication: Strong English proficiency (written and verbal) with an ability to follow complex creative briefs.



Nice to Have:

Experience within a marketing agency environment.

Familiarity with Slack, Asana, and Google Workspace.



How to Apply

We value attention to detail. To be considered, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line/Start of Message: Use the phrase “Video Editor for Inumin”.

Proof of Tech: Attach screenshots of your Internet Speed Test and your PC Specifications.

Your Background: Attach an updated CV.

Portfolio: Share direct links to your best Canva designs and short-form video edits.



The "Why": In 2–3 sentences, tell us why your editing style is the right match for a cinematic boutique agency.



Note: We only review applications that follow all instructions. Incomplete submissions will not be considered.

title: Need Instagram Automation Expert
description:
I run mass follow/unfollow campaigns and use automation to grow Instagram accounts. My main issue right now is getting new accounts warmed up properly without triggering bans or action blocks.



I need someone who understands Instagram’s trust and safety algorithms and can help me:



Warm up new or aged accounts safely (manual or semi-automated behavior)

Reduce the risk of phone/email verification loops and bans

Set up proper session timing, activity patterns, and proxy/dedicated IP testing

Possibly help troubleshoot why accounts are getting flagged (shadowbans, “action blocked,” etc.)

Provide daily check-ins on account health for a set number of accounts

Experience required:

You don’t need to be a developer, but you must have hands-on experience with Instagram automation, warming strategies, and avoiding bans.



Payment:



$5 USD/hour to start (training + testing phase)

After 2 weeks, increase to $6–$10/hour depending on performance and reduction in bans

Hours: Flexible, 10–20 hours/week to start, potentially more.



To apply:

Tell me about your experience with Instagram account warming and which methods have worked best for you. Also, let me know your availability.

title: Wix Studio Technical SEO & Velo Developer
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for an experienced Wix Studio developer who can support a fast-growing directory and content platform. This role requires someone who is strong in both front-end implementation and technical setup, with proven experience in Wix Studio, Velo, technical SEO, structured data, and payment or gated-access functionality.



This is not a basic design-only role. We need someone who can think strategically, solve technical problems independently, and communicate clearly on progress, blockers, and next steps.



**What We Need Help With**



* Building and improving pages in Wix Studio

* Working with Wix CMS collections, dynamic pages, and datasets

* Implementing technical SEO best practices across content and directory pages

* Adding and troubleshooting JSON-LD schema markup

* Setting up structured data such as FAQ, Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, Article, and other relevant schema types

* Creating clean URL structures and improving internal linking setup

* Troubleshooting indexing, metadata, page structure, and on-page SEO issues

* Building paid listing, claim listing, or gated-access workflows

* Setting up payment flows for pages, subscriptions, pricing plans, or member-access pages

* Working with Wix Members Area, Pricing Plans, and paid access restrictions

* Creating custom functionality in Velo when native Wix functionality is not enough

* Connecting forms, buttons, and member actions to CMS collections

* Helping create scalable workflows for business owners to claim, pay for, and manage listings



**Required Skills**



* Strong hands-on experience with Wix Studio

* Strong experience with Velo by Wix

* Strong understanding of Wix CMS, dynamic pages, and dataset permissions

* Solid technical SEO knowledge

* Experience implementing and validating JSON-LD schema

* Understanding of page indexing, structured data, metadata, canonical issues, redirects, and internal linking

* Experience building payment-related flows inside Wix, including Pricing Plans, gated pages, paid member access, or listing claim systems

* Ability to troubleshoot custom logic involving logged-in members, CMS records, and permissions

* Strong written communication and daily status reporting



**Nice to Have**



* Experience with directory-style websites

* Experience building claim-a-listing workflows

* Experience with attorney, local service, employer, or resource directories

* Familiarity with Google Search Console and SEO QA

* Experience improving site architecture for large content sites



**What Success Looks Like**



* Pages are built correctly and function properly

* JSON/schema is implemented accurately and without errors

* Technical SEO issues are identified and fixed proactively

* Payment and claim workflows work cleanly

* CMS and member permissions are set up correctly

* Communication is consistent, direct, and reliable

* Clear daily updates are provided with completed work, blockers, and next steps



**Communication Expectations**



* Daily end-of-day status updates are required

* Must communicate blockers clearly and early

* Must respond directly to project-related questions within a reasonable timeframe during working hours

* Must be comfortable documenting work and providing handoff notes when needed



**To Apply, Please Include**



1. Examples of Wix Studio sites you have built

2. Examples of technical SEO work you have completed

3. Examples of JSON-LD/schema you have implemented

4. A description of any Wix payment, pricing plan, gated-access, or claim-listing workflows you have built

5. Confirmation that you are comfortable with daily updates and written documentation

6. Your availability and hourly or project rate



**Screening Questions**



1. Have you built in Wix Studio using Velo and CMS dynamic pages?

2. Have you implemented JSON-LD schema manually in Wix?

3. Have you set up Pricing Plans, gated pages, or paid access in Wix?

4. Have you connected logged-in members to CMS-based workflows?

5. How would you approach a “claim this listing” feature for existing directory pages?

6. What technical SEO tasks inside Wix are you strongest at?

7. Can you provide daily end-of-day updates?

title: Online Chat Sales Specialist — High-Earning Remote Role
description:
We are hiring Chat Sales Specialists to join our growing remote team. You will be chatting with paying subscribers on a content platform, building relationships, and driving sales through conversation. This is a long-term, full-time position with real earning potential — not a one-time gig.

If you've ever worked in customer service, live chat, sales, virtual assistance, or even dating apps — and you're great at written English — this role will feel natural to you. We provide full training, scripts, and support. You just need to bring the right attitude and communication skills.

Why This Role Is Different:

This isn't a BPO call center. There are no phone calls. Everything is text-based. You'll be chatting one-on-one with subscribers, making them feel valued, and naturally guiding conversations toward purchases. Think of it as a mix between a sales rep and a relationship manager — all through messaging.

Your Day-to-Day:



Chat with subscribers via direct messages on a content platform

Build genuine connections that keep subscribers engaged and spending

Sell premium content using scripts and frameworks we provide

Adapt your communication style to match different subscriber personalities

Report your daily performance (messages, response time, sales)



Who We're Looking For:



Strong written English — you write naturally, not robotically. Slang, humor, and tone matter.

Typing speed of 50+ WPM

Laptop or desktop computer with stable internet (no phone-only setups)

Available for 8-hour shifts. We have morning, afternoon, and overnight shifts available.

You're a people person — you enjoy conversation and know how to make someone feel special

Hardworking, reliable, and coachable — you show up on time and take feedback well



Experience in any of these is a plus (but not required):



Live chat support or customer service

Online sales or telemarketing

Virtual assistant work

Social media management

CRM tools



What You'll Earn:



Base pay: $3–$5 per hour depending on experience

Performance-based commission on sales — our top earners make significantly more than base pay alone

Weekly or bi-weekly payments

Full training provided before you start — no experience in this specific industry needed



Shifts Available (US Eastern Time):



Morning: 6AM – 2PM EST

Afternoon: 2PM – 10PM EST

Overnight: 10PM – 6AM EST



Let us know which shift(s) work for you.



How to Apply

Please read carefully — applications that skip these steps will not be reviewed.



Click "Apply for this Job" and write us a message. Do NOT copy-paste a generic application.

In your message, include:



Your name and age

Which shift(s) you can work

Your typing speed (test at 
)

Your English level

Any relevant work experience (chat support, sales, VA, etc.)

Answer this question: "A paying customer messages you saying he's been feeling ignored and is thinking about leaving. What would you say to keep him?" (No right or wrong answer — we want to see how you communicate.)





At the very bottom of your message, write: "I have read the full description."



Thoughtful applications will be contacted with next steps. We are hiring on an ongoing basis — even if there's no immediate opening when you apply, strong candidates will be kept in our pipeline.

title: Brand Deal Fulfillment Coordinator
description:
We broker and manage brand partnerships on behalf of our creators — handling negotiations, deal structure, and execution so our talent can focus on making content. This role sits right at the center of that work.



We're looking for someone to own the execution side of our brand deals from close to delivery. You'll be the bridge between our brand clients and our talent — making sure creators are briefed, concepts get executed correctly, timelines are hit, and every deal lands cleanly.



From day one you'll be in direct contact with brands and talent on real, active campaigns. This is a coordination and accountability role, not a creative or strategy role. If you get satisfaction from making sure nothing falls through the cracks — and you want to learn the influencer business from the inside — this is the right seat.



—



HOW A DEAL MOVES THROUGH YOU



Receive & review the concept — Review deal terms and the creative brief. Make sure deliverables, usage rights, and deadlines are airtight before anything moves to the creator.

Brief the creator — Deliver the brief, confirm they understand expectations, and answer questions. You're the primary point of contact between the brand and talent during production.

Manage production & approvals — Track submissions, run the brand review process, and coordinate any revision requests or reshoots until the concept is signed off.

Confirm go-live — Verify content posted on schedule and all deliverable requirements were met.

Close it out — Alert accounting to send the invoice. Flag the completed deal to your manager so they can go after the next one.

—



QUALIFICATIONS



Required: · Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field · Strong written and verbal communication skills · Highly organized — able to manage multiple active deals simultaneously · Comfortable holding people to deadlines without burning the relationship · Detail-oriented — you catch when a submission doesn't match the brief



Preferred: · Prior experience in account management, talent coordination, PR, or agency operations · Familiarity with influencer marketing platforms (Grin, Aspire, or similar) · Working knowledge of major social platforms and how sponsorship disclosures work



—



THIS ROLE DOES NOT INCLUDE · Market research or trend analysis · Sourcing or pitching brand deals · Creative strategy or campaign concepting · Content creation or social media management



—





WHAT IT'S LIKE HERE



We care about output, not hours logged.



If you're early in your career, hungry to learn, and want to be close to where deals actually get made — we want to hear from you.



To be considered, please let respond by telling us the following in your response

1. Have you worked a deal fulfillment role before?

2. Are you someone who is extremely responsive on a moments notice?

3. What is your favorite animal and why?

title: Brand Communications Manager
description:
About the job



About Us:

Moe’s Group is a global leader in skincare manufacturing, trusted by more than 100 international beauty brands. We provide end-to-end product development solutions—from formulation and prototyping to production and scale-up. With world-class labs, clean formulations, and a commitment to transparency and quality, we help brands bring innovative skincare products to market efficiently and successfully. We are driven by excellence, customer satisfaction, and a workplace culture rooted in fairness, merit, and collaboration.



Brand and Client Experience Manager







Skincare Contract Manufacturing







Role summary



Own the end to end client experience from first contact through repeat purchase. Your job is to increase client satisfaction, reduce friction across sampling and production, improve retention and referrals, protect our reputation online, and ensure fast, professional responses across social and messaging channels.



This department does not exist yet. You will build it. That means you will design the processes, create the playbooks, set the standards, implement the reporting, and run the day to day execution yourself at the start. Later, you will help hire and train support under you. We need someone who is self motivated, resourceful, and comfortable creating structure from zero.



This role is cross functional. You will work daily with Sales, R&D, QA, Production, Packaging, and Logistics to standardize communication, tighten handoffs, prevent avoidable delays, and reduce escalations.



Primary outcomes you are responsible for

Within the first 90 days, you will deliver measurable improvements in:



Faster and clearer client onboarding and sampling experience



Higher sample to PO conversion

Higher repeat PO rate and lower churn

Improved Client NPS trend and lower detractor



Volume



Fewer escalations caused by unclear expectations,

label issues, claim confusion, or timeline surprises

Improved online reputation management including review response coverage and rating

trend

Improved response time and resolution quality across social and messaging channels

A functioning Client Experience and Reputation function with SOPs, templates, dashboards, and weekly cadence







Key responsibilities

Build the Client Experience function from zero

Audit the current journey and identify the biggest friction points

Design the client experience operating system: SOPs, templates, checklists, escalation paths, and reporting

Implement a weekly cadence for VOC review, issue review, and cross functional action items

Create a plan to scale the function by hiring and training support under you







Client journey ownership

Map the full client journey from inbound to sampling, compliance, production, and fulfillment

Identify friction points, delays, and failure modes

Build SOPs and playbooks that reduce back and forth and prevent surprises

Create clear handoff standards between Sales, R&D, QA, Production, Packaging, and Logistics







Voice of Client program

Run a Client NPS and feedback program

Survey at key milestones: sample shipped, sample approved, first PO shipped, ticket closed, and 60 to 90 day check in



Segment results by client type, product category, stage, account owner, and timelines



Turn feedback into a prioritized action plan with owners and deadlines

Report weekly on trend, drivers, and progress of fixes







Communication and expectation setting

Create standardized client communication templates for every stage such as onboarding, sampling updates, revision requests, approvals, production timelines, delays, and shipping

Define what we promise, what we do not promise, and how we communicate tradeoffs

Improve clarity on timelines, revisions, formula scope, stability, compliance, MOQ, packaging constraints, and change requests

Ensure the team adopts a consistent tone and process



Sampling and revision system

Standardize sampling workflow, revision limits, and decision checkpoints

Reduce sample loops by improving intake forms and decision criteria

Track sampling SLA from request to sample shipped and time from sample shipped to feedback

Monitor revision count per project and reasons for revisions





Escalation and recovery

Own the escalation playbook for delayed timelines, failed samples, packaging issues, labeling issues, and dissatisfied clients

Create recovery workflows that protect trust and prevent churn

Coordinate internal post mortems and document preventative actions





Reputation and trust management

Monitor and manage the company’s online reputation across key platforms such as Google Business Profile, LinkedIn,
, industry directories, and relevant review sites

Respond to reviews and comments in a professional, brand aligned, and policy compliant way, including both positive feedback and critical complaints

Build a review response playbook with templates, tone guidelines, and escalation rules for sensitive situations



Flag systemic issues surfaced in public reviews and route them into the Voice of Client program with clear owners and deadlines

Proactively increase review volume through ethical review generation workflows at the right milestones, without incentives that violate platform policies

Maintain accurate business listings across platforms including address, hours, phone, website links, and service descriptions





Social inbox and customer service coverage

Monitor inbound messages across social and messaging channels such as Instagram,
, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and website chat if applicable

Respond quickly and professionally, qualify inbound leads, and route requests to the correct internal owner



Create a saved replies library, tone guidelines, and escalation rules

Track response time, common questions, and themes that indicate confusion in marketing, website copy, or sales process

Build the plan to hire and train a Customer Experience Coordinator under you, including SOPs, templates, and quality checks





Internal enablement

Maintain a shared source of truth for every active client including timelines, deliverables, decisions, risks, and next steps

Build internal checklists for handoffs and stage gates

Train the team on the new standards and keep them adopted through weekly reinforcement and audits



Directives for how to operate in this role

Build first, then optimize

Do not wait for perfect tools or perfect data. Create structure quickly, then improve it iteratively



Reduce friction first

Every change must remove confusion, reduce delays, or reduce back and forth



Make promises precise

No vague timelines. No implied capabilities. Everything should be clear and documentedFeedback must turn into fixes

NPS, reviews, and inbox themes only matter if they become projects with owners, deadlines, and follow up





Protect compliance and credibility

Never allow unsupported claims, unclear labeling, or risky positioning to reach a client



Measure the process, not opinions

Use metrics to identify bottlenecks such as sampling SLA, revision cycles, time to first PO, repeat PO rate, escalations, on time delivery



Create systems that scale

Templates, checklists, dashboards, and SOPs beat heroics. Build repeatable workflows



Own the client narrative

If something slips, clients hear it early with options and a plan. No surprises



Cross functional wins only

You do not hand off problems. You coordinate solutions across teams until resolved



Protect reputation daily

Monitor review platforms and brand mentions consistently. Respond quickly, stay calm, and move issues to a private resolution path while documenting root causes internally



Never argue in public

Acknowledge, apologize when appropriate, state the next step, and take the resolution offline. The goal is trust, not winning



Inbox zero mindset

Social and messaging channels must not feel ignored. Keep response times tight, use templates, and escalate fast when needed



KPIs and weekly reporting

Client NPS overall and by segment

Top detractor themes and status of fixes

Sample SLA: request to sample shipped, shipped to feedback, revision count per project

Sample to PO conversion rate

Time to first PO



Repeat PO rate and reorder interval

Escalation volume and root causes

On time delivery performance for first PO clients

Review response time and response rate

Average star rating trend by platform

Review volume and review velocity

Top recurring review themes and operational fixes completed



Social inbox response time, response rate, and resolution time

Inbound message categories and lead routing performance

Department build progress: SOPs shipped, templates shipped, dashboard live, cadence running, adoption status







Required experience and skills

3 to 6 years in client experience, account management, operations, or brand partnerships in a B2B environment

Proven ability to build a function from scratch: creating SOPs, templates, reporting, and routines without heavy oversight

Strong process mindset and comfort creating order from chaos



Excellent writing for client communication, expectation setting, and issue handling



Comfort with skincare manufacturing concepts: ingredients basics, packaging constraints, stability, and compliance coordination

High ownership, calm under pressure, and strong escalation judgment

Ability to manage public facing responses on review platforms and social channels with professionalism and discretion







Nice to have

Experience in cosmetics manufacturing, packaging, supply chain, or compliance

Experience with HubSpot CRM workflows, ticketing systems, or operations dashboards

Experience managing social inbox tooling and building response libraries and escalation playbooks

Experience hiring or training support coordinators



Interview signals we are hiring for

Self starter who ships systems without being asked

Thinks in root causes and operational fixes

Writes clearly and professionally under pressure

Comfortable telling clients no and protecting boundaries

Understands manufacturing tradeoffs and does not overpromise

Handles public review responses calmly and professionally

Can build a support function that scales by hiring and training.



Turn feedback into a prioritized action plan with owners and deadlines



Why join us?

- 100% remote work opportunity

- Long-term stable job with significant room for professional growth.

- Fixed Weekends Off

- All necessary tools, courses, and subscriptions provided.



Learn more about our company by visiting our website: 
/. For the latest updates and opportunities, follow us on LinkedIn: www.
/company/moesgroup/

title: Part-Time Video Editor (Short Form + Long Form) — Long-Term Role
description:
Hi there,



I'm a VP at a national real estate company based in Chicago. I'm in the early stages of building out a content brand on LinkedIn and Instagram, and I need a dedicated editor to help me turn my long-form video and podcasts into polished short-form clips, AND to keep the long-form pieces clean and professional.



Important, and please read this carefully:



This is a part-time role that starts small. I don't have a massive content library yet. I'm building one. To start, expect roughly 10 to 20 hours a week. The workload will grow over time as my recording schedule ramps up, and I want one person to grow with it instead of starting over every few months.



If you're someone who needs 40 hours a week from day one, this isn't the right fit yet. If you have a main gig or other clients and want to add a long-term, reliable side role that could grow into more, keep reading.



You will NOT be client-facing. No calls, no
s to my customers. All your work is behind the scenes, supporting me.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO EACH WEEK



Short-form work (Reels, LinkedIn video, IG clips, 15 to 60 seconds)

- Cut punchy short-form clips from my long-form videos and podcasts

- Add burned-in captions, hooks, b-roll, light motion, and trending pacing

- Make sure every clip is scroll-stopping in the first 2 seconds



Long-form work (full videos, podcasts, 5 to 45 minutes)

- Edit full-length videos and podcast episodes start to finish

- Remove filler words, tighten pacing, fix audio, add b-roll and light graphics

- Keep the long-form pieces clean, professional, and on-brand



Thumbnails and covers

- Design thumbnails, cover images, and simple graphics

- Make the content look like it came from a professional studio



WHAT I NEED YOU TO ALREADY KNOW



I don't care which editing program you live in. Use what makes you fast and gets the best result. What I care about is that you can actually do both sides of the work.



ALSO REQUIRED



- Experience doing BOTH short-form and long-form edits. I need both, not just one.

- A strong eye for pacing, composition, clean captions, and readable thumbnails

- Clean audio editing skills — you know how to remove filler words, fix levels, and make voiceovers sound professional

- Strong written English (captions need to be accurate and well-formatted)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



- Motion graphics or After Effects basics

- Podcast editing experience

- Familiarity with LinkedIn and Instagram video best practices



WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE FOR YOU



- 10 to 20 hours a week to start, with flexibility on when you work

- $300 to $500/month to start, based on experience and portfolio

- Paid on time every two weeks via PayPal or Wise

- Long-term role. As my content output grows, your hours and pay grow with it. This is meant to scale with me over the next year or two.

- 13th month bonus once you cross the 12-month mark



TO APPLY, PLEASE ANSWER THESE QUESTIONS IN YOUR REPLY



1. Send me a short-form clip (under 60 seconds) you cut from a longer piece. I want to see the actual work, not just hear about it. Tell me which tool you edited it in.

2. Send me one long-form piece (5 minutes or longer) you edited. Video or podcast, both fine. Tell me which tool you used.

3. Which editing tools do you use for short-form vs. long-form, and how long have you been using each?

4. Send me one thumbnail or cover graphic you've designed that you're proud of.

5. Are you currently working with other clients, and if so how many hours do you have open per week?

6. What's your internet speed and do you have a backup connection?

7. At the top of your reply, type the word "Chicago" so I know you actually read this post.



I read every application personally. Generic copy-paste replies get ignored. If you take 15 minutes to send me a real answer, I'll take 15 minutes to read it.



Thanks,

Peter

title: Digital Collaboration Specialist (With Sharepoint experience)
description:
ABOUT 10X HEALTH SYSTEM

10X Health System is a pioneering company at the forefront of the health and wellness industry, dedicated to revolutionizing the way individuals approach their personal health and well-being. With a philosophy rooted in the principle that optimal health is the foundation for a life lived to the fullest, 10X Health provides cutting-edge solutions and personalized health plans designed to empower individuals to achieve and maintain peak physical and mental performance. The company's comprehensive approach to health combines the latest advances in medical science, nutrition, fitness, and technology to offer a suite of services that include state-of-the-art diagnostic testing, individualized treatment protocols, and ongoing support from a team of world-class health professionals. 10X Health's commitment to innovation and results has established it as a leader in the health optimization space, catering to those who strive to push the boundaries of what is possible in their health journey.



POSITION SUMMARY

The Digital Collaboration Specialist supports the organization’s internal collaboration and knowledge management systems by maintaining SharePoint sites, building automated workflows, and developing visually consistent internal materials. This role helps ensure company resources, documentation, and tools are organized, accessible, and easy for teams to use. Working cross-functionally with multiple departments, the Digital Collaboration Specialist coordinates the collection and structuring of internal resources, supports the development of SharePoint pages and Power Automate workflows, and creates branded presentation templates and visual assets. The role plays an important part in improving operational efficiency by helping teams centralize information, streamline processes, and maintain consistent communication materials. This position requires a combination of technical proficiency, visual design capability, and strong organizational skills, with a focus on enabling teams to access the tools and information they need to work effectively.



OBJECTIVES

• Support the design, development, and maintenance of SharePoint sites to ensure internal resources are organized, accessible, and easy for teams to navigate.

• Build and maintain automated workflows using Power Automate to streamline operational processes and reduce manual administrative tasks.

• Create visually polished slide decks and presentation materials that align with company branding and communication standards.

• Develop and maintain presentation templates, style guides, and visual assets to promote consistency across internal communications and documentation.

• Coordinate with cross-functional teams to gather, organize, and centralize company resources, ensuring information is accurately documented and easily accessible.

• Maintain structured documentation of shared resources within SharePoint and other internal platforms to ensure information remains current and reliable.

• Monitor usage and collect feedback from internal stakeholders to support ongoing improvements to SharePoint sites, workflows, and internal documentation tools.

• Assist in identifying opportunities to improve efficiency through better use of digital tools, documentation, and automated processes.



COMPETENCIES

• High attention to detail, with a focus on quality control and consistency in branding, formatting, and content delivery.

• Skilled in creating standardized templates and assets that can be leveraged across the organization.

• Demonstrated proficiency with Microsoft SharePoint, Microsoft Office (PowerPoint, Word, Excel), and visual design tools such as Canva.

• Ability to produce clear, accurate documentation and visual content that simplifies complex information for diverse teams.

• Strong business acumen with the ability to understand operational priorities and translate them into effective solutions.

• Thorough grasp of company principles, frameworks, and messaging, with the ability to translate them into clear, engaging training content and internal communications that reinforce alignment and learning.

• Proficiency in visual tools and process mapping software such as L
 or similar platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, or a related field preferred, or equivalent professional experience in administrative, operations, or content.

• Prior experience supporting internal systems, content development, or process documentation in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment is a plus.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Virtual Assistant – Video Editor & Facebook Ads Manager (Ecommerce)
description:
We are a growing ecommerce store looking for a fast, creative, and highly organized Virtual Assistant to join our team. Your main job is simple but high-volume: edit short-form fashion video ads and launch them as
/Instagram campaigns — every single day.



If you are quick with video editing, comfortable inside Meta Ads Manager, and can keep up with the fast pace of fashion content, we want to hear from you.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Our brand moves fast. Trends change daily and so do our ads. You will edit short, punchy fashion video clips and immediately turn them into live
 ad campaigns. This is a volume role — you will be creating and posting 5 ad campaigns per day, so speed, consistency, and organization are everything.



RESPONSIBILITIES

- Edit short-form fashion video ads daily (15–30 seconds) — clean cuts, on-trend transitions, captions, music, and brand feel

- Create and launch 5
/Instagram ad campaigns per day using Meta Ads Manager

- Write short, compelling ad copy for each campaign (headlines, primary text)

- Set targeting, budget, placements, and scheduling for each campaign

- Keep an organized daily log of all campaigns launched



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience in short-form video editing — fashion, lifestyle, or retail content preferred

- Hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager (creating campaigns, ad sets, and ads)

- Ability to produce and post 5 complete ad campaigns per day consistently

- Fast worker with strong attention to detail — quality AND speed matter here

- Reliable internet connection and own equipment

- Good written English for ad copy

- Can work independently and meet daily targets without reminders



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)

Basic familiarity with AI tools like Kling AI, Veo 3, or Gemini is a bonus. No deep experience needed — just being open to using them to speed up your workflow is a plus.



WHAT WE OFFER

- Competitive salary 

- Stable, long-term role with a growing fashion brand

- Opportunity to grow with the brand as we scale

title: Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a Business Systems Specialist to help build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our day-to-day operations. In this role, you will partner with stakeholders to understand business processes, translate needs into technical solutions, and deliver automation, reporting, and integrations that scale.

 

The ideal candidate is a strong communicator who can comfortably move between business users and technical implementation. While we use specific tools like Salesforce, Boomi, Power Automate, and Power BI, we are looking for someone with a solid foundation in CRM/ERP administration, system integrations, and workflow automation who is eager to learn and master our specific tech stack.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Workflow Automation

      o Design, build, and maintain automated workflows to streamline business processes.

      o Troubleshoot and optimize existing automations for performance, reliability, and clarity.

      o Implement approval workflows, notifications, data syncs, and operational automations.



• Reporting & Analytics

      o Build and maintain business reports and dashboards based on stakeholder requirements.

      o Connect to data sources, shape data, and create clear visualizations for decision-making.

      o Ensure reporting is accurate, well-documented, and easy for end users to interpret.



• System Integrations

      o Configure and support integration processes across internal systems.

      o Assist with monitoring, error handling, and ongoing integration improvements.

      o Document integration logic, data mappings, and dependencies.



• CRM/ERP Administration & Enablement

      o Implement and configure CRM/ERP environments (Dynamics 365, Salesforce, etc.) to align with client-specific workflows).

      o Assist with data imports, validation rules, reports, dashboards, and user support.

      o Partner with teams to improve adoption and ensure the CRM/ERP matches business processes.



• Cross-Functional Support

      o Gather requirements, map current-state and future-state processes, and recommend solutions.

      o Provide clear documentation (process flows, system configs, runbooks).

      o Communicate status, risks, and timelines effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 

Qualifications

Required

• Experience with CRM/ERP Systems Foundation: Experience supporting or administering a CRM/ERP (e.g., Dynamics 365, Salesforce, HubSpot).

• Automation & Integration Experience: Familiarity with building automated workflows and connecting systems (e.g., Power Automate, Zapier, Boomi, MuleSoft, etc.).

• API Knowledge: Basic understanding of APIs (REST preferred), including authentication concepts and data formats (JSON).

• Comfort Working with APIs: Ability to use API documentation to understand how to connect and move data between systems.

• Business Process Knowledge: Strong ability to understand business workflows and translate them into system logic.

• Excellent Communication: Strong written and verbal skills, with a customer-service mindset.

Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, etc.).

• Familiarity with iPaaS concepts (monitoring, error handling, retries, logging).

• Experience working in a ticketing system and documenting changes.

• A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a strong desire to learn new tools and technologies.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2004) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Email Marketing Assistant
description:
Email Marketing Assistant



Date With the Muse



[
](
)



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you’re not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. You are committed to excellence and take pride in a job well done.



We understand that not every person is ready for this level of performance and we appreciate the honesty of those who d
 this is not the right place for them. On the other hand, you would make an ideal candidate to join our company if you are willing to commit to the following principles:



- Accountability: see it, own it, solve it, do it

- Become part of the solution

- Respect for others and their feelings

- Act now.

- Ask the question: “What else can I do?”

- Ask the questions: “What coaching do you have for me?” and “What can I do better?”

- Personal ownership and pride

- Reject average

- Show others that you care



Part-Time | Remote

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, systems-driven
 Marketing Specialist who is deeply experienced in Mailchimp and can own the execution, tracking, and optimization of our
 campaigns from start to finish.

This is not a beginner role. You must already know how to use Mailchimp at an advanced level and be able to execute without hand-holding.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for building, scheduling, tagging, automating, and tracking
 campaigns inside Mailchimp to support launches, lead nurturing, and ongoing marketing initiatives.

Success in this role means:

Campaigns go out accurately and on time

Audience segmentation is intentional and strategic

Automations run cleanly and reliably

Data is tracked and reported in a way that informs decisions



Core Responsibilities

Campaign Execution

Build and schedule
 campaigns in Mailchimp

Format
s for clarity, readability, and brand consistency

Ensure all links, tags, and tracking are correctly implemented

Conduct final QA before sending (no broken links, formatting errors, or tag issues)

Audience Segmentation & Tagging

Apply and manage tags based on lead source, behavior, and engagement

Maintain clean audience organization (no duplication, no tag chaos)

Segment lists for targeted campaigns (launches, webinars, nurture sequences)

Automations

Build and maintain automated
 sequences (welcome flows, nurture sequences, event follow-ups)

Ensure automations trigger correctly based on tags and user behavior

Troubleshoot and fix any automation issues proactively

Data Tracking & Reporting

Track key metrics: open rates, click-through rates, conversions, unsubscribe rates

Provide clear weekly reports with insights (not just numbers)

Identify what’s working, what’s not, and where to optimize

Systems & Maintenance

Maintain a clean, organized Mailchimp backend

Document processes and ensure repeatable workflows

Flag issues before they become problems



Required Experience

Advanced, hands-on experience with Mailchimp (non-negotiable)

Proven ability to:

Build campaigns from scratch

Set up and manage automations

Use tags and segmentation strategically

Track and interpret campaign performance data

Strong attention to detail (you catch what others miss)

Ability to follow SOPs while also thinking critically when something doesn’t make sense



Ideal Candidate

Systems thinker (you see how all the pieces connect)

Proactive (you don’t wait to be told something is broken)

Organized and methodical

Comfortable working independently and owning outcomes

Able to execute quickly without sacrificing precision



Definition of Done

A task is complete when:

The campaign is sent or automation is live

All tags and segmentation are correctly applied

All links and tracking are verified

Performance is tracked and reported



Commitment & Reliability (Non-Negotiable)

This role requires absolute reliability and follow-through.

Campaigns will often be scheduled days or weeks in advance

You are expected to complete work ahead of deadlines—not at the last minute

You must ensure you have working access to Mailchimp at all times (login issues are not an acceptable blocker)

If something is not scheduled when it should be, that is a failure of the role

If an issue arises, you are expected to flag it early—not when a campaign is about to go out

This is not a “log in when you feel like it” position.

 This is a time-sensitive execution role tied directly to revenue.

## To Apply



Qualified applicants are encouraged to apply as soon as possible. To express interest please submit 



a cover letter addressed to the CEO detailing why you are uniquely qualified for this role,



a resume,



and a DISC profile 



 materials to 
 with the headline



Interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis. This position begins ASAP for the right candidate. 



Applications received through this platform/website will not move forward.

description:

We're a growing digital marketing agency in California, USA that focuses on helping dental practices grow mainly through websites and advertisements.

mber who will join us as our designer.

Most weeks will be low intensity but with each new client, work will spike. I would estimate at most an hour a day of work on low intensity days and up to 5 hours of work on higher intensity days.

title: AUTHOR BUSINESS ASSISTANT — P.A. Mason (Indie Urban Fantasy Author)
description:
Location: Remote 

Hours: 8 hours per week to start, with potential to grow

Rate: $4–6 USD per hour based on experience

Start date: Flexible — targeting April
ABOUT THE ROLE



I'm Paula Mason (P.A. Mason), an Australian indie author of military urban fantasy fiction. I'm looking for a reliable, self-directed assistant to help run the business side of my author career. This is not a general admin role — it's a specialised position for someone who understands the indie publishing world, reads fantasy or romance, and can work independently without hand-holding.



The role starts at 8 hours per week with real potential to grow, particularly around book launches. Work is fully remote and async — you choose your hours provided priority tasks are completed on time.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



The task mix shifts week to week depending on where I am in my publishing cycle. Core responsibilities include:



• Audiobook production using ElevenLabs — listening through AI-generated chapters against the manuscript, logging errors with timestamps, making fixes, and organising final files in Google Drive. This is one of the most important parts of the role.



• Platform and database maintenance — keeping book listings accurate and SEO-optimised across Shopify, Goodreads, StoryGraph, ISFDB, YouTube, and other platforms.



• Community engagement — participating authentically in 
 and
 reader communities (r/UrbanFantasy, r/suggestmeabook, enemies-to-lovers groups etc.) as a genuine reader, recommending books where relevant.



• Monthly blog post production — managing a monthly Urban Fantasy book recommendations post on my Shopify website, including Canva graphics, AI-assisted content generation, HTML implementation, and SEO metadata.



• ARC and review management — tracking advance reader copies and reviews ahead of new releases (ramping up later in 2026).



• Market research — finding newsletter swap partners, comp authors, reviewers, and promotional opportunities.



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



Essential:

• Experience supporting indie authors — you understand KDP, Kindle Unlimited, and the self-publishing ecosystem

• A genuine reader, ideally in fantasy or romance — you understand reader communities from the inside

• Strong written English — you'll be representing my author brand in online communities

• Self-directed and detail-oriented — I need someone who takes a brief and runs with it

• Comfortable with Google Workspace, Canva, and Meta Business Suite



Highly desirable:

• Experience with ElevenLabs or similar AI audio tools

• Experience with Shopify

• Familiarity with Goodreads, StoryGraph, or book databases

• Understanding of SEO basics



---



WORK STYLE



We operate in two modes depending on my release schedule:



MODE A (Launch weeks): 80-90% of time on audiobook production, Shopify listings, and ARC tracking. Research tasks paused.



MODE B (Maintenance weeks): Focus on community engagement, database updates, blog production, and market research.



All tasks are tracked in a shared Google Sheet. Weekly end-of-week summary required. Primary communication via WhatsApp for quick questions — if you're stuck for more than 10 minutes, just ask.



---



HOW TO APPLY



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow these instructions exactly will not be considered.



1. Subject line must include the word Barney — applications without this word in the subject line will not be opened.



2. Include a short paragraph (5-8 sentences) about your experience supporting authors or working in the book/publishing space. Be specific — tell me what you've actually done, not just what you can do.



3. Attach your CV.



4. Complete this short task (approx. 10 minutes):



Visit these two pages:



— The Elf Captive on Amazon: 



— Amazon Top 100 Urban Fantasy: 



From the Top 100 list, choose 3 books you believe are the strongest comp titles for The Elf Captive based on genre, tropes, and reader audience overlap. For each book provide:

— The Amazon link

— One sentence explaining why it's a strong match



This task has no single correct answer — I'm looking for your judgment and your ability to identify reader crossover. It should take around 10 minutes.



Successful applicants will be invited to complete a paid 2-hour skills test before any further commitment is discussed. The preferred candidate will be offered a four week trial period upon commencement.



I look forward to hearing from you.

title: Virtual Learning & Content Assistant
description:
Position Overview

We are a 30 year injury law firm that is focusing on elevating our training. We are looking for a highly organized Virtual Learning & Content Assistant to support our training programs.



In this role, you’ll be given the content by trainers and team leads. We need someone to take the content and create courses in our LMS and training resources in SharePoint. You will also turn live trainings and internal information into clear, easy-to-use digital resources with the help of AI and other content authoring tools. 



Key Responsibilities

Build & Manage Online Courses in our LMS 

Put content given to you by trainers into an easy to follow course 

Create from the content given to you:

-Quizzes and tests 

-Assignments and activities

-Reading materials and resources

Keep courses up to date as training changes

Make sure courses are easy to follow and well-structured.

Create SharePoint Content

Upload content in our SharePoint platform

Create helpful articles, guides, and resources for employees based on course content 

Turn live trainings into clear written content.

Keep all content consistent in style and format.

Track Training & Reports

Keep attendance records for trainings up to date

Make sure training data (enrollments, completions, etc.) is accurate.

Help organize reports and track files.

Identify and fix missing or incorrect data.

Ensure leadership has reliable, up-to-date training data. 

Support Digital Content Creation

Help turn existing training into digital content.

Use tools (including AI) to create:

-Online course content

-SharePoint resources

-Short learning materials

-Check all content for accuracy and quality.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Strong organization and time management skills

- Clear writing and attention to detail

- Comfortable working independently (remote role)

- Learning Management Systems (LMS)

- SharePoint or similar tools

- Ability to work with different teams and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

-Experience in training, learning & development, or similar work

-Familiarity with AI or content creation tools

-Experience supporting live or blended training

-Experience in legal, corporate, or professional services (a plus)

-Proficiency in PowerPoint



Why This Role Matters

This role helps us turn training into lasting, easy-to-access resources. You’ll play an important part in making sure employees can learn, grow, and find the information they need—long after training sessions are over.

title: Senior Bookkeeper at TaxAce

Sloppy bookkeeping is not an option here—it directly undermines the sophisticated tax work we do. You take ownership of clean books the way a craftsperson takes ownership of their work. Accounting Manager ? Controller

About TaxAce Group

TaxAce Group Inc. is a concierge luxury tax strategy firm serving business owners and high-net-worth individuals. We provide premium bookkeeping, tax planning, and financial strategy to clients who expect the best.



Apply
